text: A must do if you're going to Paracas. Desert and beach, wild, amazing

text: Absolute must see when in Paracas and should be on the Peru's must see lists. Beautiful views on every view point. Easily accessible on a day trip by bicycle, scooter or car. Just skip the Lagunillas restaurants, they are mostly tourists traps and you can eat much better food for the same price in Paracas.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

text: Such a raw, beautiful place. Explored the reserve by bike and spotted condors and so many sea birds. Love the La Mina beach to take an ocean dip and enjoy the afternoon in the last part of the bike route!

text:
Beautiful beach against a huge rock wall that is located 30 kilometers from the Panamericana Sur within the Paracas National Reserve. Crowdy if you go during holidays, otherwise is peaceful and enjoyable. Beautiful azure water. if you don't have your own car you have to hire a tour.

I recommend going by car so you can manage your own time and enjoy the trip at your own pace
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

text: The reserve is beautiful.  The process of purchasing tickets and boarding the boat for travel is confusing.  Thankfully the tour guide was able to the information in both English and Spanish.  Visitors should be prepared for about a 15 minute boat ride through open water which can be windy, wet and cold.

I guess as Tourist usually do not go there they do not care… really sad to see.

text: This is a great place to see Stark beautiful ocean views from an almost dead desert. This is one of the dryest places in the world, getting less than a millimeter of rain a year! You won't see plants, but you will see many sea birds and spectacular views. Go in the morning for less wind and fog.

Beautiful beaches!!!

text: We stayed at the Aranwa Resorts, and Spa, Paracas, Peru for two nights in May, 2018.   The suite given to us was quite spacious and had a balcony overlooking the Paracas Bay.   Even though the hotel is located on a sprawling area, there was no coffee maker or kettle in the room, the refrigerator was missing even though there was space in the modular unit in the suite.   There was no running hot water in the room on the second day of our stay.   We informed the front desk of the issue, but they did not rectify the problem satisfactory to us.   Also no one speaks even simple English and communication with the hotel staff was a major issue.    Based on the above we are giving a 3 star rating inspite of the resort having fantastic facilities.

textTranslated:
Within the Peruvian State's Protected Natural Areas, this reserve stands out for its incredible abundance of marine life, which is protected from all industrial and semi-industrial activity; only artisanal fishing is permitted. Among its main attractions are the Candelabro geoglyph and the Ballestas Islands, which are part of the traditional tourist circuit on speedboats. The journey takes approximately 2 hours and 30 minutes from the Paracas Tourist Marina.

There are two fees: S/5.00 soles for boarding and S/11.00 soles for entry to the reserve. The cost of transportation and guided tours is negotiated directly with the tour operators.
text:
Dentro de las Áreas Naturales Protegidas por el Estado Peruano, esta reserva resalta por la increíble cantidad de fauna marina, la misma que se encuentra protegida de toda actividad industrial y semi industrial, apenas se permite la pesca artesanal. Dentro de sus principales atractivos se encontrará El Candelabro y las Islas Ballestas, las mismas que forman parte del circuito, turístico tradicional en las embarcaciones rápidas, cuyo recorrido toma unas 2h30m desde la Marina Turística Paracas.

Existen dos pagos: S/5.00 soles por el derecho de embarque y S/11.00 soles por el ingreso a la reserva, lo que cueste el servicio de transporte y guiado se conversa directamente con los operadores turísticos.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: It's an incredible and very impressive place, with so much to see. You can visit it in several ways; I did a hike to see the sunset, which I highly recommend, but it's important to do your research beforehand. The wind in the area is incredibly strong, which is extremely dangerous for people with asthma or similar conditions. Aside from that, the place is a 20/10.
text: Es un lugar increíble y muy imponente, tiene muchas cosas por ver, se puede visitar de varias formas, en mi caso hice una caminata para ver el atardecer, muy recomendada pero importante informarse bien, en la zona el viento es tremendamente fuerte lo cual en personas con asma o alguna condición similar es super peligroso , fuera de eso el lugar es un 20/10
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated:
A corner of the world where nature breathes freely – The Paracas Nature Reserve (visited during the local winter, not summer)

Visiting the Paracas Nature Reserve is like crossing the threshold of a dream sculpted by wind, sea, and time. A place suspended between desert and ocean, where beauty manifests itself in essential, powerful, primordial forms. Here, nature speaks with a clear and ancient voice, and those who listen are transformed.

The cliffs plunging into the ocean seem painted by a divine artist: shades of red, ochre, and gold blend with the deep blue of the Pacific in a breathtaking chromatic contrast. Every corner is a living painting, changing with the light of day. The beaches – some silent and deserted – are guardians of a rare, almost sacred tranquility.

But it is the pristine harmony of the landscape that truly leaves you breathless. Paracas is a hymn to the simplicity and power of nature, an invitation to slow down, to contemplate, to respect. It's a place you don't just look at: you live it, you feel it, you carry it within you.

If there's a place in the world where silence has the sound of beauty, that place is the Paracas Nature Reserve.
text:
Un angolo di mondo dove la natura respira libera – La Riserva Naturale di Paracas (visitata durante inverno locale no estate)

Visitare la Riserva Naturale di Paracas è come varcare la soglia di un sogno scolpito dal vento, dal mare e dal tempo. Un luogo sospeso tra deserto e oceano, dove la bellezza si manifesta in forme essenziali, potenti, primordiali. Qui, la natura parla con voce chiara e antica, e chi sa ascoltarla ne esce trasformato.

Le scogliere che si tuffano nell’oceano sembrano dipinte da un artista divino: sfumature di rosso, ocra e oro si fondono con il blu profondo del Pacifico, in un contrasto cromatico mozzafiato. Ogni angolo è un dipinto vivo, mutevole con la luce del giorno. Le spiagge – alcune silenziose e deserte – sono custodi di una quiete rara, quasi sacra.

Ma è l’armonia incontaminata del paesaggio che lascia davvero senza fiato. Paracas è un inno alla semplicità e alla potenza della natura, un invito a rallentare, a contemplare, a rispettare. È un luogo che non si guarda soltanto: si vive, si sente, si porta dentro.

Se c’è un posto al mondo dove il silenzio ha il suono della bellezza, quel posto è la Riserva Naturale di Paracas.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A fascinating protected area, unexpectedly teeming with life in a corner of the desert that meets the Pacific. The birds are the most striking and abundant species. It's fun to explore by mini-buggy, always respecting the natural environment.
text: Muy interesante espacio protegido, inesperadamente lleno de vida en un rinconcito del desierto que se sumerge en el Pacífico. Las aves, las especies más vistosas y abundantes. Divertido si vas en minibuggy, siempre respetando el entorno natural.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: It's a natural reserve for marine species on the Peruvian coast. Paraca means sand rain, and the red sand is a sign of volcanic activity combined with iron, causing its oxidation. Lots of marine life, birds, and seals.
text: Es u a reserva natural de especies marinas en las costas peruanas. Paraca, significa lluvia de arena y se observa arena roja que indica la actividad volcánica en combinación con el hierro provocando su oxidación.  Mucha vida, aves marina, focas.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: I'm going to enjoy the scenery of my peace of mind. I love to fish and I've been doing it for 55 years in Paracas, the paradise of adventure fishing... by boat, on rocks, on the beach... and the singing of the birds and their acrobatics as they hunt and catch their food....
text: Yo voy a disfrutar del paisaje de mi paz mental, me encanta pescar y lo hago desde hace 55 años en Paracas el paraíso de la pesca de aventura....en lancha,peña,playa....y el cantar de las aves y sus piruetas para cazar,pescar sus alimentos ....
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: I loved the beach; it's beautiful, crystal clear, and super peaceful. I recommend going on a weekday to avoid the crowds. La Mina really does look like a swimming pool.
text: Me encantó la playa, es hermosa, cristalina y súper tranquila. Recomiendo ir un día de semana para evitar las grandes multitudes. Realmente, La Mina parece una piscina
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated:
A wonderful nature reserve to explore either by tour (car, dune buggies, etc.) or even by bike!
You can swim on the beach, and even though it's crowded, it's worth it! We arrived on a seemingly foggy day, but then the clouds cleared and the sun came out, allowing us to enjoy the view. So don't despair; the weather could improve soon.
text:
Meravigliosa Riserva Naturale da girare sia con i tour (macchina, dunebuggies, etc.) o anche in bici!
Si può fare il bagno nella spiaggia e anche se è affollata, ne vale la pena! Noi siamo arrivati e c’era una giornata apparentemente tutta nebbiosa, ma poi si è aperto ed è uscito un bel sole che ci ha permesso di goderci il panorama. Quindi non disperate che il tempo potrebbe migliorare nel giro di poco.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A very nice experience. Right in Paracas, you have the option of going to the Ballestas Islands to enjoy sea lions, guano birds, and Humboldt penguins. In March, the sea lions are mating and the penguins have migrated. You can find seafood everywhere at various prices.
text: Muy linda experiencia, mismo Paracas tienes la opción de ir a Islas Ballestas, para disfrutar de lobitos marinos, aves guaneras  y pingüinos de Humboldt, en época de marzo los lobos están en apareamiento y las pingüinos han migrado, la comida marina puedes encontrar por todo lado y de varios precios
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated:
The place where the Paracas Desert meets the Pacific Ocean. Picturesque high cliffs surrounded by desert hills. Various colors of rock and sand. Including the famous Playa Roja.

You can explore by car, bicycle, quad, or buggy.
text:
Miejsce, w którym pustynia Paracas spotyka się z Oceanem Spokojnym. Malownicze wysokie klify, w otoczeniu wzgórz pustynnych. Różne kolory skał i piasku. W tym słynna Playa Roja.

Zwiedzać można samochodem, rowerem, kładem i buggy.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: La Mina beach is beautiful. The sand is perfect for walking barefoot and feels amazing; the water is cold, but the scenery makes it worthwhile.
text: La plata La Mina es hermosa. La arena es perfecta para caminar descalzo y se siente súper bien, el agua es fría pero el paisaje lo justifica
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: We hiked the entire reserve with some friends. We started at the main entrance and exited on the side that leads to Huacachina. This hike is only for adventurers, as several kilometers are not well marked and you can easily get lost without GPS, since it's desert.
text: Recorrimos toda la reserva con unos amigos. Iniciando por el ingreso principal y saliendo por la parte que da hacia la Huacachina. Recorrido solo para aventureros ya que varios km no están bien demarcados y puedes desorientarte sin la ayuda del GPS, ya que es desierto.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The Paracas National Reserve is a must-see destination on Peru's southern coast. Here, the desert meets the sea in spectacular landscapes like Red Beach, the cliffs of the La Catedral viewpoint, and waters teeming with marine life. You can explore it on buggy, ATV, bicycle, or scooter tours, kayak, and see flamingos, sea lions, and even Humboldt penguins. Entrance costs S/11 (approximately $3 USD), and tours start at S/50 (approximately $12 USD). The Ballestas Islands tour (highly recommended!) costs around S/30 (approximately $8 USD) plus port fees. Although the wind can whip up sand in the summer, and some roads are a bit rough, the experience more than makes up for it. Prices at restaurants and for services can be high, but the beauty and tranquility of the place are worth every penny. It's the perfect getaway filled with nature, adventure, and unforgettable views.
text: La Reserva Nacional de Paracas es un destino imperdible en la costa sur del Perú. Aquí el desierto se fusiona con el mar en paisajes espectaculares como Playa Roja, los acantilados del mirador La Catedral y las aguas ricas en vida marina. Puedes explorarla en tours en buggy, cuatrimoto, bicicleta o scooter, hacer kayak, ver flamencos, lobos marinos y hasta pingüinos de Humboldt. La entrada cuesta S/11 (aprox $3 USD) y los tours van desde S/50 (aprox $12 USD); el paseo a las Islas Ballestas (¡súper recomendado!) ronda los S/30 (aprox $8 USD) más tasa portuaria. Aunque en verano el viento puede levantar arena y algunas vías están un poco deterioradas, la experiencia lo compensa todo. Los precios en restaurantes y servicios pueden ser elevados, pero vale cada sol por la belleza y tranquilidad del lugar. Ideal para una escapada llena de naturaleza, aventura y vistas inolvidables.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated:
A beautiful place to visit and explore, with dozens of beaches surrounded by cliffs, colorful sands and crystal-clear waters, as well as hundreds of bird species and a vast desert. Don't be fooled by the strong winds, use sunscreen.

Among the beautiful landscapes, highlights include the scenery of Praia Vermelha (unique in South America, with brownish sand) and the Catedral, a beautiful spot to admire the coast.
text:
Lugar bonito para visitar e explorar, com dezenas de praias rodeadas de falésias, areias coloridas e águas cristalinas, além de centenas de espécies de aves e um vasto deserto. Não se deixe enganar pela forte ventania, use protetor.

Entre as lindas paisagens, destaque para o cenário da Praia Vermelha (única da América do Sul, com uma areia de tom amarronzado) e a Catedral, belo ponto para admirar a costa.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Very nice, clean and well-maintained place, we had a great afternoon at the beach.
text: Muy lindo lugar limpio y conservado, pasamos una buena tarde de playa.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated:
To get there, you drive along a paved and well-maintained road. It's easy to find using Waze. To enter the beach, they'll ask for the tickets you paid for at the reserve entrance.

The "official" parking lot is small. In the summer, people will likely park along the road.

There's no internet signal on the beach. There are no restrooms on the sand... You have to go up to the parking lot to access them.

The beach itself is VERY beautiful. I went in the winter... The summer scene must be different.
text:
Para llegar se maneja por una pista asfaltada y afirmada. Es fácil llegar con el Waze. Para entrar a la playa pedirán los tickets que se pagaron en entrada a la reserva

Estacionamiento "oficial" pequeño. En verano de seguro estacionan en el camino

No hay señal de internet en la playa
No hay baño en la arena... Debes subir a estacionamiento para acceder a baño.

La playa en si es MUY bonita. Fui en invierno... La dinámica de verano debe ser distinta
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: It was an excellent experience. Seeing the vastness of the sea and learning about the ancient Candelabra was something I'll never forget. Learning about different cultures always enriches you.
text: Excelente experiencia, ver la inmensidad del mar y saber lo antiguo del candelabro fue algo que no olvidaré. Aprender de las culturas siempre te llena de cosas buenas.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A spectacular place. I recommend going on your own by renting a motorbike. The best beaches are Raspón (next to La Mina) and Playa Mendieta, which is much farther than the usual route but well worth the trip. We explored the reserve over two separate days to fully enjoy the beaches, as the distances are considerable. On the first day, we traveled to the Mirador Catedral viewpoint and spent the day at Playa Roscón, and on the second day, we went to Playa Mendieta and passed through the Salinas de Otuma salt flats (something pink). A place that definitely surprised me.
text: Un lugar espectacular. Recomiendo ir por tu cuenta en una moto de alquiler. La mejor playa para estar es el Raspón (a lado de La Mina) y Playa Mendieta que es mucho más lejos que el circuito habitual pero vale la pena ir hasta allá. Nosotros recorrimos la reserva en dos días distintos para poder disfrutar de las playas porque las distancias son grandes. El primer día recorrimos hasta el Mirador Catedral y pasamos el di en playa Roscón y el segundo día fuimos hasta Playa Mendieta y pasamos por Salinas de Otuma (algo rosa). Un lugar que sin dudas me sorprendió.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated:
You can't go wrong at the Reserve.

It's a magical place where you can experience the magnitude of creation's beauty from every angle.
The entrance fee is quite affordable and inexpensive per person.
text:
No hay pierde en la Reserva.
Es un lugar mágico donde se vive la magnitud de la belleza de la creación en todos sus ángulos.
El ingreso tiene un costo por persona bastante accesible y económico.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: As a nature reserve, it's a very pleasant place to visit, with a spectacular view of the ocean. It's worth a visit.
text:
Como reserva natural, es un espacio muy agradable de visitar, una vista espectacular del océano.
Vale visitarla
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated:
Paracas National Park should have tropical vegetation at this latitude, 14° south, at the level of the Amazon rainforest, and yet it's a desert with temperatures ranging between 15 and 20°C. It also has a cold-water ecosystem due to the Humboldt Current (an ocean current flowing from Antarctica to the Peruvian coast) which maintains the local cold. At La Mina beach, the water temperature is listed as 4°C. We didn't test it.

This area is considered one of the most productive and abundant in the world for its marine life, thanks to the profusion of krill, plankton, and other species that supply the entire food chain. Very beautiful landscapes.
text:
Le parc national de Paracas devrait disposer d'une végétation tropicale à cette lattittude, 14• sud au niveau de la forêt amazonienne, et pourtant c'est un désert avec une température qui oscille entre 15 et 20°, et il dispose d'un écosystème des eaux froides du fait du courant de humboldt (courant marin venant de l'Antarctique jusqu'aux côtes péruviennes) qui maintient le froid local. A la plage de la Mina il est mentionné que l'eau est à 4°. On n'a pas testé.
Cette zone est considérée comme les plus productives et abondantes au monde pour sa production d'espèces marines du fait de la profusion de krill, plancton, ... qui approvisionnement toute la chaîne alimentaire.
Très beaux paysages
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: These places and beaches are absolutely beautiful; some spots look like paintings. The birds are so photogenic and the pictures are stunning. The trip is well worth it for anyone looking for beautiful photos followed by a refreshing swim at the beach.
text: Son muy preciosos esos lugares y las playas, algunos lugares parecen cuadros. Algunas aves se prestan para la foto y quedan hermosas. El recorrido lo vale para quien busca lindas fotos y luego un buen baño de playa.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: It's nice. Even in September, the water is warmer than the East Sea. I think I could swim there even in winter. The surroundings aren't like those in Korea, so it's fun to get in the water.
text:
좋타 9월인데도 동해보다 물따뜻한데요
겨울에도 수영할수 있을것 같습니다
주위 배경이 한국에 없는거라 물에 들어갈 맛이납니다
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Entrance: 11 soles per person. Keep your ticket to access the beaches. Bathrooms and changing rooms cost 2 soles each. We went on Sunday (not recommended) - it was too crowded. The reserve is beautiful, with several beaches where you can swim. Most tours take you to Playa La Mina, but it's very small and the most crowded. Rent a scooter or car for more flexibility. The water is cold. There's little shade. The distances between beaches are long, and the sun is very strong. You can rent a bicycle, but it's not the best option.
text: Entrada: 11 Soles por persona. Conservar el tiquete para poder entrar a playas. Los Baños y vestidores cuestan 2 soles cada uno. Fuimos el domingo (no recomendable) demasiadas personas. La reserva es hermosa, tiene varias playas en las que te puedes meter. La mayoría de tours te llevan a playa la mina pero es muy pequeña y las más llena de gente. Alquila una scooter o auto para ir más flexibles. el agua es fría. Poca sombra. Las distancias entre una playa y otra son largas y el sol es súper fuerte. Se puede alquilar bicicleta pero no es lo más recomendable.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Wow, beautiful beach! The water temperature was perfect, refreshing. There are umbrellas (I think they cost extra). Restrooms (2 soles extra) and changing rooms (I assume they also cost extra). Speakers aren't allowed. I went on a Sunday, and it was very crowded. There's parking available.
text: Wow, hermosa playa, la temperatura del agua era perfecta, refrescante. Hay sombrilla (de pago, creo). Baños (de pago 2 soles) y vestidores (supongo de pago también). No permiten entrar parlantes. Fui un domingo, demasiada gente. Hay estacionamiento.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated:
The reserve is wonderful.

The views are spectacular. All different. All incredible.

The reserve's services could be better. The restrooms don't have enough water, and they charge an entrance fee.
And the most objectionable thing... there are unscrupulous people who take groups of tourists off the designated path, reaching places that others cannot and should not go.
text:
La reserva es maravillosa.
Las vistas son espectaculares. Todas distintas. Todas increíbles.
Los servicios de la reserva podrían ser mejores. Los baños no tienen agua suficiente y cobran su ingreso.
Y lo más criticable...hay inescrupulosos que llevan a grupos de turistas y se salen del camino autorizado llegando a lugares que otros no pueden ni deben llegar.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The beach is very beautiful and worth visiting.
text: Muy linda la playa vale la pena visitarla
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: It is a beautiful tourist spot to stroll within the reserve to see some of the marine fauna and flora found around its islands.
text: Es un bonito lugar turístico para pasear dentro de la reserva para ver un poco de su fauna y flora marina que hay por sus islas.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: An excellent way to experience the Paracas National Reserve from the air, a paragliding flight offers a unique perspective of the coast and desert. Everything is very well organized, making it an ideal activity for those seeking something different during their visit.
text: Una excelente experiencia para conocer La reserva nacional de Paracas desde el aire, un vuelo en parapente permite ver la costa y el desierto desde una perspectiva diferente. Todo muy bien organizado y es una actividad ideal para quienes buscan algo distinto durante su visita.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful and very affordable, with 11 soles for adults and 3 soles for children. The Julio C. Tello Museum is beautiful and cool, with 7.5 soles for adults and 1 sol for children. Highly recommended for a family weekend. Very sunny.
text: Hermoso y muy económica las entradas, Adulto 11 y niños 3 soles. El museo Julio C. Tello, hermoso y fresco, adultos 7.5 y niños 1 sol. Muy recomendable para un fin de semana familiar. Mucho sol.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A cozy, quiet place to disconnect from the city
text: Un lugar acogedor, tranquilo, para poder desconectarte de la ciudad
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: This beach is highly recommended. The waters are crystal clear and the waves are gentle. There are several spots for taking photos, and umbrellas and chairs are available for rent. There is a 5 soles entrance fee for non-residents of Ica.
text: Una playa muy recomendada para visitar, las aguas son cristalina transparentes, de suave oleaje, hay diferentes espacios para tomarse fotos y alquilan sombrillas y sillas para los turistas. La entrada tiene un precio de 5 soles como impuesto para quienes no son de Ica.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful place with a gorgeous ocean and an excellent guided tour on a modern boat. The people were very attentive and friendly. 100% recommended for coming with your children and family 😊👍.
text: Hermoso lugar con bello océano y excelente viaje guiado en una embarcación moderna. La gente muy atenta y amigable. 100% recomendado para venir con sus hijos y familia 😊👍.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: An amazing experience. It's located within the Paracas Forest Reserve, and the entrance fee is eleven soles per person. The road isn't great, but it's passable. Once you arrive, you'll truly enjoy it. Being in that small bay surrounded by a natural wall of stones that dates back many, many years is truly breathtaking.
text: Tremenda experiencia. Está ubicada dentro de la reserva forestal de Paracas el ingreso por personas esta tasado en once soles, la carretera no está muy buena pero si se transita sin problemas. Una vez llegado al sitio de verdad que se disfruta mucho. Estar en esa pequeña bahía rodeado de una muralla natural de piedras de hace muchísimos años
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated:
La Mina Beach is very clean, the sea is crystal clear, and the waves are calm. As you can see in the videos, being a National Reserve, there are restrictions regarding beach maintenance and avoiding disturbing other visitors with noise from loudspeakers or street vendors.

Plus: Only food items such as fruit, soft drinks, or water are allowed.
text:
La Playa La Mina es muy limpia, el mar es muy calro y sus olas son calmadas. Tal como pueden apreciar en los vídeos al ser una Reserva Nacional hay restricciones en el aspecto tanto del cuidado de la playa como el no incomodar al resto de visitantes con sonidos emitidos por parlantes o por el comercio ambulatorio.

Plus: Solo dejan ingresar con alimentos como fruta, refrescos o agua.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A very beautiful place. You can swim, but bring a towel and a change of clothes. From 1 pm onwards, the winds get stronger and colder.
text: Muy bello lugar. Se puede bañar, llevar toalla y muda de ropa. A partir de la 1 hay vientos más fuertes y fríos.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful place, there's no doubt that Peru has a wealth of landscapes. Highly recommended. All the beaches are clean and well-maintained. If you go by boat, I recommend sitting in the middle towards the back, because depending on the boat model, sitting at the front might not allow you to see the scenery as you should, especially if you buy the Ballestas Islands tour.
text: Lindo lugar, no hay duda de que el Perú tiene riqueza en paisajes, recomendadisimo todas las playas son limpias y bien cuidadas, si van en lancha les recomiendo que vayan al medio para atrás, porque depende del modelo de la lancha, que si estas adelante no te permite ver el paisaje como debe de ser en el caso de que compren el Tour de las islas ballestas.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Simply magical, spectacular, beautiful. I love my Peru; it has extraordinary landscapes, and Paracas is no exception. A few months ago, I visited it with someone from abroad, and they fell in love with it, especially seeing the wildlife in its natural habitat... There's nothing like it. If you want to have a wonderful time and create a memorable experience, I recommend visiting Paracas so you can be amazed by the epic views, desert, and beaches...
text: Simplemente mágico, espectacular, precioso. Amo mi Perú, tiene paisajes extraordinarios y Paracas no es la excepción. Hace unos meses lo visité con alguien del exterior y se enamoró un tanto, sobre todo de ver la fauna en su hábitat natural... No hay nada como ello. Si desean pasar un agradable momento y crear un recuerdo memorable, les informo a visitar Paracas para que queden maravillados con la vista épica, desierto y playa...
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: What can I say… a magical place. We did it by bike, it took us 4 hours in total. It was deserted, the scenery was all to ourselves, Playa Roja is truly magnificent, seeing all those beautiful birds was amazing! A fantastic day.
text: Que dire… un endroit magique. Nous l’avons fait à vélo, nous avons mis 4h en tout. C’était vide, les paysages rien que pour nous, playa roja est vraiment magnifique, voir tous ces beaux oiseaux c’était ouf ! Une super journée.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated:
Very beautiful, quite small for a beach, warm and greenish waters, the waves break right at the water's edge, it's very calm, you can even swim, but be careful! You might feel holes in the ground where you're standing and suddenly lose your footing. It's lovely!

P.S.: Avoid bringing alcohol; I went on a Saturday and they were checking everyone's backpacks.
text:
Muy bonito, bastante pequeña para ser una playa, aguas tibias y verdosas, las olas revientan en el inicio del mar, es muy tranquilo, hasta se puede nadar, pero cuidado!, de pronto se sienten huecos que de estar parada puedes de pronto ya no sentir el suelo, es muy lindo!.
P. D. : eviten llevar licor, fui un sábado y revisaban las mochilas de todos.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful beach to enjoy with the family
text: Playa hermosa para disfrutar con la familia
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Unfortunately, much of the Paracas National Reserve is becoming increasingly deteriorated. A few years ago, an earthquake destroyed the Cathedral, and now the sea is damaging almost everything... Playa Roja has practically disappeared as well 😢
text: Lamentablemente cada vez está más deteriorada gran parte de la Reserva Nacional de Paracas, hace algunos años un sismo destruyó la Catedral, ahora es el mar quien viene deteriorando casi todo... prácticamente también desaprecio Playa Roja 😢
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated:
A wonderful experience, for my first time at sea.
The waves and the place are very calm, and the staff there are very helpful.
text:
Una maravillosa experiencia , par mi primera vez en el mar.
Las olas y el lugar es muy tranquilo , además de la buena atención de los encargados de aquel lugar.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: One of the best beaches in the south, the waves aren't too strong, making it ideal for the whole family. This beach isn't very big, which is one of its advantages. You'll be able to keep an eye on your family comfortably. Don't forget to bring your food and dispose of your trash in the designated bins. The sand is fine.
text: Una de las mejores playas del sur, las olas no son muy fuertes, ideal para ir con toda la familia. Esta playa no es muy grande así que esa es una de sus ventajas. Podrás cuidar a tu familia cómodamente. No olvides llevar tus alimentos y botar la basura en los tachos destinados para este fin. La arena es fina.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated:
Very nice beach. Everything was very quiet and clean. There are trash cans.
The only drawback is the restroom upstairs... They charge 2 soles!! There's no water in the restrooms. No changing facilities. Nothing, and yet they charge 2 soles. It's not much, but it seems excessive when you already paid 10 soles to enter the Paracas National Reserve. And that's per person... There were 22 of us.
text:
Muy buena playa. Todo muy tranquilo muy limpio . hay contenedores de basura .
El único inconveniente es el servicio higiénico arriba ... Te cobran 2 soles !! Por usar el servicio no hay agua en los servicios higiénicos. No hay cambiadores. Nada y aún así te cobran 2 soles no es mucho pero me parece exceso cuando ya pagaste 10.00 soles para ingresar a la reserva de paracas. Y por persona.. Nosotros eramos 22 personas
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful beaches with lovely viewpoints. You can take a tour or explore on your own by renting motorbikes or buggies. The latter is a lot of fun and costs around 100 soles. There are several restaurants to eat at.
text: Bonitas playas y con miradores bonitos puedes hacer en tour y por tu cuenta rentando motos o buggy está ulitma es muy divertida con un precio.de unos 100.soles tienes dentro varios restaurantes para comer
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The beaches are amazing, that's for sure. You have to go and experience it. Go by private car, that would be my top recommendation.
text: Las playas son riquísimas, tiene. Que ir a vivir la experiencia. Vayan en auto privado, esa sería mi gran recomendación.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The beach is very pretty, but there are fish and dolphins nearby. There are changing rooms and restrooms. There's a grocery store. The downside is that there are no showers. You can rent umbrellas and chairs at affordable prices. P.S.: Arrive early to secure good spots.
text: Muy lindo la playa, pero con presencia de peces y delfines a la cercanía. Con servicios de vestidores y servicios. Una tienda de alimentos. Lo malo es que no hay duchas. Puedes alquilar las sombrillas y sillas a precios accesibles. Posdata: llegar temprano para poder apartar buenos puestos.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: La Mina beach boasts crystal-clear water and white sand. It's a very peaceful beach during the morning hours. There are no restaurants nearby, and bringing food onto the beach is prohibited; there's only a kiosk before the access road to the beach.
text: Playa la Mina, su mar es de agua cristalina y limpia, con arena blanca. Es una playa muy tranquila durante horas de la mañana. No hay restaurantes cerca y tampoco permiten ingresar con comida a la playa, solo hay un kiosko antes de la bajada a la playa.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated:
The beach is located within the Paracas National Reserve. It's a peaceful place; the beach isn't very choppy, but you should be careful because the current pulls you in. You can see dolphins and some fish. Disposable plastics and food in pots are prohibited, and there are other restrictions.

I went on a tour that cost me 95 soles. Besides spending a couple of hours at La Mina beach, you also visited Playa Roja (a viewpoint) and what remains of La Catedral (another viewpoint—the view is spectacular). In addition to the tour price, there's an 11-soles entrance fee to the Reserve.
text:
La playa está dentro de la Reserva Nacional de Paracas. Es un lugar tranquilo, la playa no es tan movida, pero se debe tener cuidado porque jala hacia adentro. Se ven delfines y algunos peces. No se ingresa con plásticos desechables, comida en ollas y hay otros tipos de restricciones.
Yo fui con un tour que me costó 95 soles y, además de estar un par de horas en playa La Mina, conoces playa Roja (mirador), y lo que quedó de La Catedral (mirador. La vista es espectacular). Además de ese precio, se paga 11 soles para entrar a la Reserva.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Excellent for lovers of ecology, geology, and scenic beauty. It's advisable to go in the morning, as the wind picks up after midday. There's a lack of trash cans and restrooms, and the food at the restaurants isn't very good unless you go very early; moreover, the restaurants themselves don't have restrooms.
text: Excelente para amantes de ecología, geología y belleza paisajística. Recomendable ir en la mañana ya que a partir del mediodía el viento es sopla con mas fuerza. Falta tachos para basura, servicios higiénicos y la comida en los restaurantes no son muy recomendables a menos que se vaya muy temprano, además que tampoco cuentan con baños dichos restaurantes.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful beach. My wife and I camped there three years ago. Now, because of the pandemic, it's not possible, and I've been told that camping won't be allowed again because the tide rises too high at night. It seems climate change is leaving us without a beach to camp on.
text: Linda playa, hace 3 años acampamos con mi esposa. Hoy por pandemia no es posible y según me han comentado ya no se volverá a acampar porque la marea por la noche sube demasiado. Al parecer el cambio climático nos está dejando sin playa para acampar.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated:
A beautiful, clean beach with lifeguards and proper rescue equipment, calm waters perfect for enjoying the sea to the fullest, and a deep blue sea with hints of green along the shore. Please do not litter to help preserve it.
Keep in mind that it gets quite windy in the afternoon, but I absolutely loved it that way.
text:
Una hermosa playa, limpia, con salvavidas y equipo adecuado para rescate, sin olas para disfrutar del mar al máximo, y dicho mar de color azul con unos tonos verdes por la orilla. Por favor no arrojar desperdicios para contribuir con su correcta preservación.
Tener en cuenta que por la tarde corre mucho viento, pero la verdad que a mi me encantó así.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: La Mina Beach is located within the Paracas National Reserve. The beach itself is horseshoe-shaped, and the surrounding hills protect it from the strong winds that blow throughout the reserve. The water is crystal clear, calm, and emerald green, and the sand is white. Near the beach, you can see several cavities that were once coal mines, hence the name La Mina Beach.
text: La Playa La Mina está ubicada en la Reserva Nacional de Paracas. La Mina tiene forma de herradura y los cerros protegen impidiendo el ingreso del fuerte viento, que sopla en toda la zona de la reserva. El agua es cristalina, tranquila, de color esmeralda y de arena blanca. En los alrededores de la playa se puede observar unas cuantas cavidades que antiguamente fueron minas de carbón, de allí proviene el nombre Playa La Mina.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The scenery is beautiful. There's a beach, the sea, and salmo – a great place for taking photos. The sea breeze can be quite strong, so it's best to bring a hooded windbreaker and sunglasses.
text: 风景很美.有沙灘.大海.沙莫.拍照的好地方.这里海风比較大.最好帶件有帽的风衣和太阳鏡
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful beach with clear water and the perfect temperature for warm weather. It's recommended to arrive as early as possible. Please remember that this is a nature reserve, so you must take all your trash with you after your visit.
text: Hermosa playa de aguas claras con la temperatura ideal para el calor. Se recomienda ir lo más temprano posible. Por favor, recordar que es una reserva natural y por ende deben llevarse todos los residuos que tengan consigo después de su estadía.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The best thing about a silver mine, I loved it
text: Lo mejor d una plata la mina la ame
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: It's a shame that since childhood I've only known this place for camping or staying in a hotel, and then going to the reserve. It wasn't until now that it became a place of peace for me, a place where I could go to pray, give thanks, or cry, completely alone and in spectacular contact with nature. Not everyone thinks the same way, but it seems they want to develop the beaches through concessions. It's better to prevent problems than to be unable to do anything about them... All it takes is for one person to care and use this platform for something truly important. Thank you.
text: Es una pena que desde niño haya conocido este lugar para hacer camping o a un hotel y luego a la reserva. No ha sido sino hasta ahora el lugar en que se habia convertido para miun lugar de paz, un lugar donde podía  ir y orar, agradecer o llorar, completamente solo y en un contacto espectacular con la naturaleza, no todos pensamos igual pero parece que quieren construir mediante concesiónes las Playas, más vale prevenir antes de encontrar el problema y no poder hacer nada... Basta con que a una persona le interese y se use este medio para algo realmente importante. Gracias
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: If you go by bike, entry is free on Mondays. After 3 pm, no one is allowed in, so bring a bike helmet. The food stalls on the pier are gone, now there are only restaurants.
text: Si vas en bici, la entrada es gratis los lunes, después de las 3 de la tarde ya no ingresan, llevar casco de bici. Ya no hay los puestos de comida del muelle, solo restaurantes
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated:
It's a nice place, the water's cold, but you get used to it.
- Restrooms cost $2.00
- Changing rooms cost $1.50
- There are no showers as of March 13, 2022
- Lifeguards are on duty.

No alcoholic beverages allowed.

Masks must be worn upon entering and leaving the beach.

Umbrellas are available for rent on the beach.
text:
Es un bonito lugar, de agua fría, pero de lo que te acostumbras
-los SS.hh cuestan 2.00
-vestidores 1.50
-no hay duchas hasta la fecha 13/03/2022
-Tienen salvavidas.
-No se permite ingreso de bebidas alcohólicas.
-Uso de mascarilla al ingreso y al salir de la playa.
-alquilan sombrillas dentro de la playa
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Don't hesitate to rent a scooter for the day so you can freely enjoy this little corner of paradise.
text: N’hésitez pas à louer un scooter à la journée pour pouvoir profiter de ce petit coin de paradis librement
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated:
A crystal-clear beach perfect for families, just keep these tips in mind:
1. Avoid weekends because it gets very crowded and you won't find a spot, plus the water gets rough.

2. No pets allowed.
3. No alcoholic beverages or fruit.
4. No plastic containers.
5. No loud music.
6. No showers.

It's an ideal place to enjoy during the week.
text:
Una playa cristalina para compartir en familia, solo deben tomar en cuenta estos consejos:
1. No ir los fines de semana porque va mucha gente y no conseguiras espacio para acomodarte, ademas que el agua se vuelve reboltosa.
2. No llevar mascotas
3. No llevae bebidas alcoholicas ni frutas
4. No llevar envases de plasticos
5. No llevar cornetas de musica
6. No tienen duchas

Es un lugar ideal para disfrutar entre semana
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: It's good... You can go with children; before leaving, there are many restaurants in the area. To go to the reserve, you have to buy a ticket and rent a boat to take you, in addition to the tax. Once you've done that, you wait to receive your wristband and be able to enter. There you'll find seals, Humboldt penguins, and guanaco birds, etc.! It's a beautiful place that's worth visiting.
text:
Ess bueno.. Se puede ir con niños antes de partir ahi muchos restaurantes por la zona..
Para ir a la reserva tienes q comprar un tiquet y alquilar un bote q te llebe aparte del impuesto ya echo esto esperar a que te den tu pulsera y poder ingresar , ahí encontrarás focas pingüinos de humblot y aves guanareas etc..!! es un lugar hermoso q vale la pena visitar..
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated:
Incredible place, I recommend going with a guide so they can explain every detail of the region. You enter a road in the desert and each point has a pier where you can take your photos. A landscape worth visiting.
Upon arriving in Paracas, it's easy to find an agency that offers this service along with Ballestas Islands. I landed around 10:30 am and immediately booked the services for both tours.
text:
Lugar incrível, aconselho ir com um guia para que ele possa te explicar cada detalhe da região. Você adentra numa estrada no deserto e cada ponto têm um píer para que possa tirar suas fotos. Paisagem que vale a pena a visita.
Ao chegar em Paracas é fácil localizar alguma agência que ofereça este serviço junto com Ilhas Ballestas, desembarquei por volta das 10h30 e logo contratei os serviços dos dois passeios.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A very nice beach, with gentle waves, like a swimming pool. If you're lucky, you might spot a dolphin or two. Food and alcoholic beverages are not allowed.
text: Playa bastante bonita, no hay olas grandes, tipo piscina. Si tienes suerte ves uno que otro delfín. No se permite el ingreso de alimentos no bebidas alcohólicas.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: It's very beautiful, but it lacks a state presence to be considered a nature reserve. They need to ensure cleanliness and train the cooks to prepare seafood dishes with a good touch of flavor, so that foreigners leave with a good impression and enjoyment of our Peruvian ceviche and other seafood dishes.
text: Es muy bonito, pero falta presencia del estado, para ser una reserva natural, y verificar, la limpieza, y capaciten a los cocineros, para que preparen los platos marinos, con un buen toque de sabor, para que los extranjeros se lleven una buena impresión y gusto de provar nuestro ceviche peruano, y demas platos marinos
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful beach; we started our tour of the reserve here since it's the furthest away. Swimming is allowed. The other beaches are very close, but going down to the beach or swimming is not permitted at La Colorada.
text: Preciosa playa, nosotros comenzamos el recorrido de la reserva por ésta ya que es la más alejada. Está permitido el baño. Las otras playas están muy próximas pero en la colorada no está permitido bajar ni bañarse.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A very nice experience; the scenery is beautiful and clean, and please, if you visit, avoid littering. They should limit the number of people allowed on the beach, as it's small and the overcrowding of tourists makes it difficult to enjoy. However, if you go further out, you can find a clearer area. But overall, it's worth a visit.
text: Muy bonita experiencia, el paisaje es hermoso, limpia y por favor si la visitan evitar ensuciar. Deberían limitar el acceso de personas ya que la playa es pequeña la sobre población de turistas hace difícil disfrutar de la playa. Aunque si te vas más allá puedes encontrar un espacio despejado. Pero en general vale la pena visitarla.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Excellent atmosphere, perfect for spending time with family and enjoying the beautiful views. Bring cash; the entrance fee is 11.00 soles per person. Children enter free.
text: Excelente ambiente, perfecto para pasar un rato familiar y disfrutar de las hermosas vistas. Deben llevar efectivo, el costo de la entrada es de 11.00 soles por persona. No pagamos por los niños
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: It is an unforgettable day and experience, especially if you do not have the opportunity to go to the Galapagos, because you can find many varieties of seabirds, many seals, 2 varieties of pelicans and magnificent little penguins, etc., and with a bit of luck, dolphins.
text: C'est une journée et une expérience inoubliable surtout si l'on n'a pas la possibilité de se rendre aux Galápagos car on retrouve de nombreuses variétés d'oiseaux de mer, de nombreux Phoques, 2 variétés de Pélicans et des magnifiques petits Pingouins etc et avec un peu de chance des dauphins .
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: You can camp there and you can bathe from 5 am onwards since the water is warm and you don't feel the cold. It has specific times when it fills up and gets a bit tedious and annoying, but it's worth it when it's almost empty.
text: Se puede acampar te puedes bañar a partir de las 5 am ya que el agua es cálida y no se siente el frío tiene sus horas específicas en las cuales se llena y se pone un poco tedioso y molesto pero vale la pena en sus momentos que se encuentra casi vacía..
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: There's no doubt that it's one of the most incredible places in Paracas. The Ballestas Islands are a unique, beautiful, and magical destination. Feeling the magic of seeing and observing the sea lions, penguins, and the different seabirds that inhabit this magical place, and learning about the history of the geological formations and the unique design on one of the islands, is truly impressive. The tour is very affordable if you go directly to the town of Paracas. There, you can buy the tour for 25 soles plus 16 soles for the entrance fee to the reserve. The tour lasts 2 hours. I hope you enjoy this wonderful place.
text: No me cabe duda que es uno de los lugares más increíbles que tiene paracas.. las islas ballestas, son un destino único, hermoso y mágico, el sentir la magia de ver y observar los leones marinos, a los pingüinos y a las diferentes aves marinas que alberga este mágico, su historia de las formaciones geológicas y de su dibujo en una de las islas es impresionante.. el Tour se puede conseguir super económico si vas directamente hasta la ciudad de paracas, allá puedes comprar el Tour por 25 soles más 16 soles de los impuestos por el ingreso a la reserva, el Tour tiene una duración de 2 horas... espero que puedan disfrutar de este maravilloso lugar.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The beach was quite crowded when we arrived, and there was no parking at the beginning. However, since it's next to Raspón, you can go to the other beach if you want, but both were quite crowded. The restaurant was the same; it's best to go early to enjoy the scenery, the birds, and the beautiful location. Entrance is paid upon entering the reserve; it's no longer free as it used to be, but it's understandable because they protect the areas in this zone, especially the marine life.
text: La playa estaba bastante concurrida cuando llegamos y ni lugar para estacionarse al inicio. Igual, al estar al lado de Raspón, se puede ir a la otra playa si desean, pero ambas estaban bastante concurridas. El restaurante igual, lo mejor es ir bien temprano, para disfrutar del paisaje, las aves y del lugar que es bello. La entrada se paga al entrar a la reserva, ya no es libre como antes, pero se entiende porque protegen las áreas de esta zona y sobretodo la vida marina.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A wonderful, naturally formed place with calm tides and cool water, perfect for enjoying with family and friends. You'll see birds and dolphins (a type of whale). The sunsets are breathtaking. I highly recommend visiting Playa la Mina; you'll love it.
text: Un lugar maravilloso, de formación natural, con marea calmada y agua fría para disfrutar en familia y amigos. presencia de aves y bufeos (familia de la ballena). El atardecer es de maravilla.  Recomiendo Visitar Playa la Mina les encantara.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Excellent beach! Clean, very family-friendly and tidy. You can go diving, kayaking, and other activities. They offer umbrella and chair rental for 30 soles.
text: Excelente playa !!! Limpia , muy familiar y ordenada , se puede hacer buceo , kayac y demas actividades , ofrecen servicio de sombrilla y sillas por 30 soles ...
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: One of my favorite beaches, clean, clear water, and no waves, you can swim freely. It has a capacity limit and they check before entering. There's an 11 euro fee, but it's worth it.
text: Una de mis playas favorita, limpia trasparente, y sin olas se puede nadar libremente, tiene aforo y revisan antes de ingresar se paga una tarifa de 11 pero vale la pena
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Very beautiful and peaceful, it's like a swimming pool and the water is clean for bathing, great! The only downside is that there aren't any restaurants, just a few kiosks that sell things that are a bit pricey. And there are no showers. But despite all that, it's a lot of fun.
text: Muy Bonito, tranquilo es como una piscina y el agua está limpia para bañarse, super! Lo malo es que no hay restaurantes de ningún tipo sólo unos quioscos que venden un poquito caro. Y no hay ducha. Pero de todo eso es muy divertido
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Small beach with clean, warm water. You can camp during the summer season, or if you want to have it all to yourself, you can camp there out of season. A magical and peaceful place.
text: Playa pequeña pero de aguas limpias y tibias.Se puede acampar en temporada de verano o si la quieres tener para ti solo puedes ir a acampar fuera de temporada.Lugar magico y tranquilo.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Excellent place to visit in summer for the local atmosphere and climate, but keep in mind that the beach is very small and almost always crowded, the entry of food is prohibited, there is a retention control of the same at the main access, the water of this beach is the most blue tones, truly a good option for people who visit this beach on weekdays, since on weekends it will be very difficult to be pleasant if you do not like people very much.
text: Excelente lugar para visitar en verano por el ambiente y clima local, pero tener en cuenta que la playa es muy pequeña casi siempre está copada, está prohibido el ingreso de alimentos hay un control de retención de los mismos en el.acceso principal, el agua de esta playa es lo máximo con tonos azulados en verdad buena opción para las personas que visiten esta playa en día de semana, ya que en los fines de semana será muy complicado estar a gusta si no te gusta mucho la gente.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: There are no waves, it's like a swimming pool. The water temperature is cold, like all Pacific Ocean beaches (due to the Humboldt Current). But the sun helps, and you can swim for quite a while. A very peaceful beach and excellent for taking photos.
text: No tiene olas, es como una piscina. La temperatura del agua es fría como toda playa del Océano Pacífico (por la Corriente del Humboldt). Pero el sol ayuda y puedes nada un buen rato. Una playa muy tranquila y excelente para las fotos.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: It's beautiful! The water is freezing, but the sun is blazing, so it balances things out! You can snorkel with an agency and take jet ski rides!
text: Es hermosa! El agua es helada pero el sol arde asi que hace un punto de equilibrio! Puedes hacer snorkel con agencia y paseos en motos de agua!
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Absolutely stunning scenery. We drove along the roads and also ventured off-road through the desert 😃 So you don't need to rent expensive quad bikes if you've already rented a car.
text:
Absolut krasse Landschaft. Sind mit den Auto die Straßen entlang gefahren und auch etwas abseits der Wege durch die Wüste 😃
Man muss also keine teuren Quads mieten falls man schon ein Auto gemietet hat.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated:
Beautiful! Here, the sand dunes of the Andean desert meet the sea. There are many birds, especially pelicans. The water is very clean and crystal clear, although quite cold.

The contrast between the deep blue and the orange of the dune sand is stunning. The beach sand is particularly light in color, unlike other beaches in Peru.
text:
Precioso!! aquí se unen las dunas de arena del desierto andino y el mar, hay muchas aves, sobretodo pelicanos, el agua es muy limpia y cristalinas, aunque bastante fría.

El contraste de entre el azul intenso y el naranja de la arena de las dunas es precioso, la arena de la playa es particularmente de un color claro, a diferencia de otras playas de Perú.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The beach belongs to the Paracas National Reserve, so there's a 10-15 PEN entrance fee. It's small, with cool, calm, and clean water. It's not very crowded because you need private transportation to get there. The road is partly unpaved. To enjoy it more, you should bring a snack since there are no restaurants nearby.
text: La playa pertenece a la Reserva de Paracas por lo que para acceder a ella debe cancelarse 10-15 PEN. Es pequeña, de aguas frías, mansas y limpias. No es muy concurrida por necesitar de transporte privado para acceder a ella. El camino es, por partes, trocha. Para disfrutarla mejor, debe irse merendando puesto que no hay restaurantes cerca.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated:
Simply beautiful, magnificent, fabulous.
...if you enjoy photography, this is a great option. I took photos with my phone, and I'm sure they would have been much better with a professional camera...I loved the place and the scenery.
text:
Simplemente hermoso, grandioso, fabuloso
...si te gusta la fotografia es una muy buena opcion. Tome fotos con mi celular y bueno con una cámara profesional estoy seguro que unieran sido muchísimo mejor ...me encanto el lugar el paisaje
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A paradise beach on the Paracas Peninsula, north of Lagunillas Beach, ideal for camping. It's a small, windy beach with crystal-clear waters, perfect for swimming. It gets very crowded in the summer, so the space feels small. Accessible by car, water is scarce, so it's advisable to bring drinking water.
text: Playa Paradisíaca en la península de Paracas, l norte de la playa Lagunillas ideal para acampar. Corre viento y es una playa pequeña de aguas cristalinas y apta para bañarse. En verano es muy concurrida por lo que el espacio de hace pequeño . Se llega en auto, el agua es escasa por tanto es recomendable llegaría para beber.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful scenery and a comfortable beach for beginner swimmers; the geography provides a cool, shaded area. Just remember it's a protected area and please take your trash with you. Leave no trace.
text: Gran paisaje y playa cómoda para nadadores principiantes, la misma geografía te provee de una zona sombreada y fresca, solo no olviden que es zona protegida y recojan su basura. Leave no trace.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful place, highly recommended for exploring and camping on the beaches, not all of them, but you can enjoy a wonderful swim that leaves you feeling incredibly relaxed 😻...The cathedral, although it collapsed, still has an impressive shape.
text: Hermoso lugar, recomendable por conocer y acampar en las playas, no en todas, pero se disfruta de un riquísimo baño que te deja relajadisimo 😻...La catedral aunque se derrumbó pero sigue con la figura impresionante.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: After visiting the Ballestas Islands, the Paracas National Reserve is part 2 to continue discovering the wonders of nature, the beautiful desert landscape and beautiful scenery.
text: Después de visitar las Islas Ballestas, la Reserva Nacional de Paracas es la parte 2 para seguir conociendo maravillas de la naturaleza, el hermoso paisaje desértico y bellos paisajes.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated:
A magnificent Paracas Nature Reserve, truly worth the detour. What nature, what silence, what beauty!
I did the mountain bike tour, and I must admit it was the best way for me to see the reserve.
Forget the bus and the car and treat yourself to this wonderful moment of connection with nature and yourself.
The desert, the sea, the animals!
THANK YOU 🙏
text:
Magnifique réserve naturelle de Paracas qui vaut vraiment le détour. Quelle nature, quel silence, quelle beauté!
J’ai réalisé la visite à VTT et je dois avouer que c’est pour moi le meilleur moyen de visiter la réserve.
Oubliez le bus et la voiture et offrez-vous ce magnifique moment de rencontre avec la nature et vous-même.
Le désert, la mer, les animaux!
MERCI 🙏
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Magnificent scenery between arid desert and wild beaches
text: Décors magnifique entre désert aride et plages sauvages
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated:
An extraordinary place to relax, just three hours from Lima, with beautiful beaches, fishing, swimming, and camping.
We went fishing, and I also took the opportunity to pursue my passion, photography.
text:
Extraordinario para relajarse a 3 horas de Lima, hermosas playas, para pesca, bañarse o acampar.
Nos fuimos de pesca y aproveche tambien para hacer mi pasion que es la fotografia.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated:
Excellent beach with stunning scenery. Ample and very secure parking.
The beach is located at the base of the cliff, so the wind is quite strong, making a good towel essential. There is an entrance fee to access the nature reserve; the path is made of compacted salt but presents no major difficulties.
text:
Excelente playa con paisaje privilegiado. Amplio estacionamiento muy seguro.
La playa se encuentra en la parte baja del acantilado, por lo que el viento es muy intenso, asi que una buena toalla les caerá muy bien. Se tiene que pagar derecho de ingreso para acceder a la reserva natural, el camino es de sal compactada pero no ofrece mayores complicaciones.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: I really enjoyed the crystal-clear water at the beach; they should just invest a little in a decent place for tourists to change their clothes.
text: Me gustó mucho conectar el agua cristalina de la playa, solo deberían invertir un poco en un lugar decente para que los turistas podamos cambiarnos de ropa.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Highly recommended place to spend time with the family; the water is clean and refreshing for a refreshing dip, the children will love it...
text: Recomendado lugar para pasar en familia, el agua limpia y riquísima para darse un chapuzón,  los niños lo disfrutarán...
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A unique place to enjoy the sea, the desert, the cliffs and the wildlife (sea lions, flamingos, Humboldt penguins...).
text: Lugar único en el que disfrutar del mar, el desierto, los acantilados y la fauna (lobos marinos, flamencos, pingüinos de Humboldt...).
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated:
The last beach before the reserve. Full of birds in the morning. When there's no wind, you can stand up paddleboard on the crystal-clear water. In the afternoon, it's a great kitesurfing spot. It has a large parking lot for campers or cars. It's free and located just before the bird reserve. Very clean and well-maintained—let's keep it that way! The place offers the best sunsets.

Last beach before the reserve. Full of birds and flamingos. When there's no wind, it's a nice spot for stand up paddleboarding. No waves at all during the morning. When the wind picks up around noon, it's an awesome kitesurfing spot.
It has a large parking lot for RVs and trailers for travelers. I think it's free. Very tidy—let's keep it that way! The place offers the best sunsets ever.
text:
La última playa antes de la reserva. Llena de aves por la mañana. Cuando no hay vie to se puede hacer stand up paddle con el agua glass. Transparente. Durante la tarde es un kitesurf spot. Tiene un estacionamiento grande para acampar con campers o autos. Es gratuito y se encue tra justo antes de la reserva de aves. Muy limpio y cuidado dejemoslo de la misma manera! El lugar ofrece los mejores atardeceres.
Last beach before the reserv. Full of birds and flamingos. When no wind is a nice spot for stand up paddle. No waves at all during the morning. When wind starts to pick up at noon is an awesome kitesurf spot.
It has a big parking lot for rvs and trailers for travellers. I think is free. Very tidy lets keep it that way! The place offers Best sunsets ever.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: It's a stunning landscape, with several viewpoints where you can appreciate the beauty of the desert. The most enchanting part is the view of the bay.
text: Es un excelente paisaje, tiene diversos miradores y se puede apreciar la belleza del desierto. Lo más encantador es la vista en la bahía.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: It's a very beautiful beach. It's recommended to go on specific days to avoid the large crowds on Saturdays and Sundays. You don't need to go to Puerto Chaco to pay the Sernanp tax. If you go on a Sunday, arrive very early to find space; it doesn't get as crowded as other beaches, and you can swim peacefully.
text:
Es una playa muy hermosa, se recomienda ir en días particulares para evitar la gran cantidad de gente que van los sábados y Domingos.
No es necesario irse al puerto Chaco para pagar em impuesto Sernanp. Si vas Domingo, ve muy temprano para que encuentres espacio, de igual forma, no se llena tanto como otras playas, y si se puede nadar tranquilamente.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A visit to the Ballestas Islands is a must, with its diverse wildlife, including sea lions, penguins, and dolphins. Also worth exploring is the nature reserve, characterized by its desert landscape and beaches.
text: Imprescindible visitar Islas Ballestas con su fauna, puedes ver leones marinos, pingüinos y delfines. Y también la reserva natural, que se caracteriza por el desierto y sus playas.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful beaches, great places to camp with family, fish, and enjoy various recreational sports. It's quite windy, so take precautions; you can use the wind to your advantage. Clean and well-maintained beaches; some of the most popular are Raspón and La Mina.
text: Playas hermosas, lugares hermosos para acampar con familia, pescar y varios deportes recreativos. Corre bastante viento así que tomar precaución, se puede usar ese viento a favor. Playas limpias y bien cuidadas, algunas de las más visitadas: Raspón, La Mina.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Crystal-clear waters, gentle waves (ideal for children), and beautiful scenery. Kayaking is available; there's a company that offers the service, and several lifeguards are on duty.
text: Aguas cristalinas, un oleaje suave recomendado para llevar niños, un hermoso paisaje. Se puede realizar Kayak, hay una empresa que presta el servicio y también hay varios salvavidas preparados.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful, absolutely gorgeous, a place to relax and enjoy the beaches and the nature reserve, don't miss it if you come to Peru.
text: Hermoso, bellísimo un lugar para relajarse y disfrutar de las playas y la reserva natural, no dejes de visitarlo su vienes a Perú.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful, secluded beaches perfect for camping and spending quality time with family, enjoying the sea, fishing, and swimming. Access from the checkpoint is easy and well-marked, but if you wish to explore further, you'll need a GPS.
text: Bonitas y alejadas playas para acampar y pasar un rato familiar observando el mar y poder pescar y bañarse. Desde la garita de control el ingreso es fácil y señalizado pero si deseas explorar más a fondo necesitas llevar GPS.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated:
Watch out for trucks and cyclists. Clean, majestic.
Visit the museum; it's very interesting.
text:
Cuidado con los camiones y los ciclistas. Limpio, majestuoso.
Visita el museo, es muy interesante
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A wonderful place to enjoy with the family. Let's take care of the reserve by not littering.
text: Maravilloso lugar para disfrutar en familia. Cuidemos la reserva sin ensuciar.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Not many people and a nice view
text: no mucha gente y linda vista
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The view is beautiful, though it's quite windy. The sea lions are gorgeous. The only downside is the boat launch; it's so crowded and disorganized. It's worth it, though.
text: La vista es muy bonita, bastante viento. los lobos marinos son hermosos. Lo malo es la entrada para embarcar, ya que hay tanta gente y mucho desorden. Vale la pena
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: This place is unique on the planet, a coastal marine ecosystem with natural charm wherever you look. Dare to experience this adventure. 🐧🌊🦀
text: Este lugar es único en el planeta un ecosistema marino costero con encanto natural por donde miremos, atrévete a vivir esta aventura.  🐧🌊🦀
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful beach. I was amazed because I didn't think there was such a beautiful beach so close to Lima. You can visit it in a day; I took a tour from Lima for 89 soles, which included a 4-5 hour visit to the beach plus visits to other nearby beaches. The water is crystal clear and looks beautiful blue and green. The sand is white. They rent umbrellas for 30 soles and chairs for 5 soles each. The water is very cold, but with the sunshine, it's quite enjoyable. There are few waves and few rocks on the shore. Highly recommended.
text: Hermosa Playa. Quedé asombrada porque no pensaba que hubiese tan cerca a lima una playa tan bonita. Se puede visitar en un día, desde lima tome un tour por 89 soles el cual incluía la visita a la playa por 4 a 5 horas más la visita a otras playas cercanas, su agua es cristalina y se ve hermosa azul y verde. La arena es blanca. Alquilan sombrillas por 30 soles y cada silla por 5 soles. El agua es super fría pero con el sol que hace se disfruta bien. Pocas olas y pocas piedras en la orilla. Super recomendada.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The beach is beautiful, with calm waves. Umbrellas, canoes, and life jackets are available for rent; there's also a kiosk and restrooms before you reach the beach access point.
text:
Muy bonita la playa, las olas tranquilas.
Hay alquiler de sombrilla, canoas, chalecos; también hay quiosko y baño antes de ingresar a la bajada de la playa.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A beautiful view, calm water, good fishing for an unforgettable time. It's beautiful; we went as a whole group and it was great, we had a wonderful time. It's highly recommended for families or groups of friends who love the sea, fishing, and natural food. This will leave you speechless; I simply have no words to describe this beautiful place.
text: Una hermosa vista agua calmada buena pesca para que se pasa unos momentos inolvidables es hermoso nos fuimos todo un grupo y fue genial la pasamos muy biem es recomendable para venir en familia o rn grupo de amigos q le encante el mar la pesca la comida natural esto te dejará sin palabras simplemente no tenho palavras para describir este hermoso lugar
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: One of the best beaches in the south, with turquoise water comparable to the best beaches in the world. This place is a must-see; you won't regret it. The only thing that needs improvement is the restroom facilities.
text: Una de las mejores playas del sur, color de agua turquesa , comparable con las mejores playas del mundo, imperdible este lugar no se arrepentirán. Solo hace falta mejorar los servicios higiénicos
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful beach. Going on a weekday was best to avoid the crowds. Easy to get to in my own car since everything is very well signposted.
text:
Hermosa playa. Ir dia de semana fue lo mejor para evitar los tumultos
Fqcil de llegar en mi propio auto ya que todo esta muy bien señalizado.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: They have terrible traffic control. They let vehicles with visitors through without tickets, without warning that tickets are required for beach access. They offer no alternative payment methods. The beaches are unsupervised. Awful.
text: Tienen un pésimo control del tránsito vehicular. Dejan pasar a vehículos con visitantes sin ticket sin advertir que son necesarios para el ingreso a playas. No tienen alternativas de pago. playas sin vigilancia.  Pésimo
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A small but very beautiful beach. Still quite clean; I hope to see it one day without any plastic littering there.
text: Una playa pequenia pero muy bonita. Aun bastante limpia, espero verla algun dia sin ningun plastico tirado por alla.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: If you want to swim, definitely let them take you to this beach. It is beautiful and clean. The price for a van for 8 people was 160 soles, or 20 per person. The driver waited with us there until we had fun and then took us back to the city. In Paracas, the ocean is not as clean and beautiful as here, so I have to recommend it.
text: Pokud se chcete koupat rozhodně se nechte zavést na tuto pláž. Je krásná a čistá. Cena za van pro 8 lidi byla 160 sol tedy 20 na osobu. Řidič tam s námi počkal až se pobavime a pak nás odvezl zpět do města. V Paracasu není oceán tak čistý a krásný jako zde, takže musím doporučit.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful beach. Very grateful to the people who preserve it.
text: Hermosa.   Playa.   Muy agradecido por las personas que la consevan
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful, secluded beach with clear water. There's no safe entrance or access point; you have to carefully descend the slope. I think it's better this way to preserve it.
text: Hermosa playa desolada, mar limpio. No hay una entrada o bajada segura, tienen que bajar por la pendiente con cuidado. Creo que es mejor así para que se siga conservando.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated:
The beach is very well maintained; before the pandemic, camping was allowed.
The staff who manage the reserve make sure that people don't bring food onto the beach.
text:
La playa esta muy bien conservada, en tiempos no covid se podía acampar.
El personal que cuida la reserva se encarga de verificar que las personas no ingresen con alimentos a la playa.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful place, very well maintained by the authorities. There are roads accessible by car, ATV, or even bicycle. Bring swimwear to enjoy the beaches.
text: Hermoso lugar, muy bien cuidado por parte de las autoridades. Hay camino tanto para ir a visitarla en auto, cuatrimoto o hasta bicicleta. Llevar ropa de baño para hacer uso de las playas.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The beach is very beautiful, with clean waters and small waves, where you can swim so easily and enjoy a clean sea.
text: La playa, es muy lindo sus aguas limpias, de olas pequeñas ,donde se puede nadar tan fácilmente, y disfrutar de un mar limpio.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful place; the entrance fee to the archaeological complex is between 10 and 15 soles. However, I think they should restrict access for people with food that litters the beaches. A little more order and respect for the preservation of these beautiful landscapes would be welcome.
text: Hermoso lugar, la entrada al complejo arqueológico vale ente 10 y 15 soles. Aunque creo deberían restringir el ingreso de personas con viandas que ensucian las playas. Un poco más de orden y respeto para el cuidado de estos bellos parajes
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Nice beach, it gets small because it's so crowded, accessible, umbrellas and chairs for rent, but you can't bring food, water is allowed.
text: Bonita playa,queda chica porque van muchas personas,accesible,hay para alquilar sombrillas y sillas y no se puede llevar comida,agua si
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated:
Nice place.
Not too crowded.

It just needed a small restaurant to eat some good ceviche.
text:
Lindo lugar.
Con poca chusma.

Solo faltaba como un pequeño restaurante para comer un buen ceviche.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The scenery, the reserve, everything in general was fantastic. However, I want to mention that the water is freezing cold; it's so refreshing that I couldn't stay in there for very long.
text: Buenisimo el paisaje, la reserva, todo en general. Sin embargo, quiero comentar que el agua es heladisima, es demasiado refrescante que no podia quedarme un buen rato ahí.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: It's a very clean beach, the sea is calm, the weather is very nice, the only drawback is that since it's a national reserve there are no restaurants to eat at.
text: Es una playa muy limpia, su mar es manso, el clima es muy bonito, el único detalle es que como es una reserva nacional no hay restaurantes para comer.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful, clean beach, and above all, a place where the zero-plastic culture is maintained. The beach has limited capacity, with a maximum of 400 people. The downside is that there are no showers, but there are shared restrooms. Camping is not allowed, but umbrellas can be rented. Bringing everyday food items like homemade meals is also prohibited. It's not recommended to go on weekends because it gets very crowded.
text: Hermosa playa, limpia y sobre todo en donde se conserva, la cultura de 0% de plastico, playa con poca capacidad, máxima de 400 personas. Desventaja, no tiene duchas pero si servicios higiénicos compartidos, no se permite acampar, pero si rentar sombrillas, también no de permite alimentos cotidianos como, comida casera.También no recomendable ir en fines de semana debido a que se encuentra muy copada.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: It was so beautiful to see the dunes and desert on one side and the ocean on the other, full of birds: boobies, flamingos, pelicans, and turkey vultures. These were some of the birds we were able to see along the way, all native to the region.
text: Súper bonito ver de un lado las dunas y el desierto y del otro lado el.oceano, lleno de aves, bobbies, flamingos, pelícanos, gallinazo de cabeza roja, esas son las aves que pudimos apreciar en el camino, pertenecientes a la región
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: It was lovely, a beautiful, clean beach, a tourist spot for family camping, the sea is calm and beautiful
text: Fue lindo es una playa limpia hermosa un lugar turístico para campar en familia el mar es manso bello
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The beach is beautiful and peaceful, but the water is very cold. Many guano birds can be seen just a few meters away, and it's suitable for snorkeling and small family camping trips.
text: La playa es bella, es tranquila, sin embargo sus aguas son muy frías. Se pueden apreciar muchas aves guaneras a pocos metros, es apta para buzeo y realizar pequeños campamentos familiares.
