title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A beautiful reserve where the sea and the desert meet. The colors create a wonderful landscape.
text: Bellísima reserva donde se unen el mar y el desierto. Los colores conforman un paisaje maravilloso.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: It's a very beautiful beach, its waters are calm but also very cold. I recommend going early to enjoy the sun more with its icy waters, and the best part is that it's only a few hours from Lima. I highly recommend it.
text: Es una playa muy bonita, sus aguas son tranquilas pero también son demasiado frías les recomiendo ir temprano para poder disfrutar más del sol con sus aguas heladas, y lo mejor es que solo está a unas horas de Lima, se las recomiendo mucho.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Politics ruins a lot of things. Barriers, overcrowding, and everything is forbidden.
text: Politik macht vieles kaputt. Absperrungen, überlaufen und alles ist verboten
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A beautiful place to relax and be with nature and the sea. Please take care of nature and the oceans. Don't leave your trash and protect this beautiful nature reserve.
text: Hermoso lugar para relajarse y estar con la naturaleza y el mar. Cuiden la naturaleza y los mares. No dejen sus desperdicios y protejan está hermosa reserva natural.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful beach, highly recommended.
text: Hermosa la playa recomendado.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: One of the best beaches in Peru: clean and calm. The water is very clear compared to other beaches in the country (including Máncora). During the summer months in Lima, this beach is extremely crowded. I was told that at other times of the year it's less crowded, which makes it more pleasant if you don't like crowds. However, even when it's busy, it's a highly recommended beach. If we were to compare it to Máncora (Piura), I'd say Máncora is somewhat "exclusive," while La Mina is "clean." However, camping is NOT allowed here. If you want to camp, I recommend Lagunillas beach, about a 10-minute drive away. Transportation isn't a problem.
text: De las mejores playas del Perú: limpia, calmada. Agua muy clara en comparación con las demás playas del país (incluida Máncora). En épocas de verano en Lima, hay concurrencia masiva hacia esta playa. Me comentaron que en otras épocas hay menos gente, lo cual lo hace más agradable si no te agrada el tumulto. Sin embargo, aún con mucha gente es una playa totalmente recomendable. Si haríamos una comparación con Máncora (Piura) diría que Máncora es un tanto "exclusiva" y La Mina es "limpia". Eso sí NO ES POSIBLE ACAMPAR en este lugar. Si deseas acampar te recomiendo la playa Lagunillas, a unos 10 minutos en auto. El transporte no es un problema.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful! My daughter and I were absolutely fascinated when we visited. Such a beautiful place to stroll with family and friends... I loved discovering the Paracas National Reserve.
text: Hermoso quede  maravillosamente fascinada junto a mi hija al conocer . Tan bello  lugar para pasear en familia,amistades ..me encantó conocer .La Reserva Nacional  de Paracas ..
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A spectacular place with a completely unexpected infrastructure. Perfect for relaxing and biking on dune trails.
text: Um lugar espetacular com uma infraestrutura totalmente inesperada. Perfeito para descansar e fazer trilhas em dunas de bicicleta
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: It's a very beautiful and clean beach, but unfortunately, every time I've gone it's been packed...you couldn't fit a pin in there. I recommend going early and avoiding holidays like Easter, New Year's, etc. There are some rocks a few meters from the shore where people swim ashore and can relax and take pictures.
text:
Es una playa muy bonita y limpia, pero lamentablemente cada vez que ido a estado repleta de gente...no entra ni un alfiler
Recomiendo qu3 vayan temprano y no vayan en días festivos como semana santa, año nuevo, etc. Tiene unas peñas a pocos metros de las orillas donde la gente llega nadando y puede descansar y tomarse fotos.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A beach with gentle waves and crystal-clear water. It's located within the Paracas National Reserve. Umbrellas and kayaks are available for rent. The beach is small, so arrive at 10 am or earlier.
text: Playa con pocas olas y agua cristalina. Se encuentra dentro de la reserva nacional de Paracas. Se pueden alquilar sombrillas y kayaks. La playa es pequeña por lo que hay que llegar a las 10am o antes
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: This beach is beautiful, very clean, not crowded, the water is freezing cold, but it's beautiful and fantastic....
text: Es Hermoso esta playa, muy limpia, poca gente, el agua es helada, pero es bonita y fantastica ....
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful place, crystal clear water, pleasant view, gentle waves, 100% family-friendly
text: Hermoso lugar agua cristalina, vista agradable, oleaje suave 100% familiar
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Small and beautiful beach. It has rules that help make the experience more enjoyable. Dolphins can be seen during your stay. 100% recommended.
text: Playa pequeña y hermosa. Tiene normativas que ayudan a que la experiencia sea mas agradable. Se pueden visualizar delfines durante la estadía. 100% recomendada.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Incredible place. A must-see in Peru.
text:
Increíble lugar.
Visita obligada en Peru
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful reserve where you can enjoy time with your family and the beaches during your visit; being respectful is the most important thing.
text: Hermosa reserva donde se puede disfrutar en familia y de las playas durante su recorrido, siendo respetoso es lo mas importante.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Incredible views of the Peruvian coast; undoubtedly a place steeped in history. The landscapes are breathtaking, so a visit is highly recommended. Just be sure to bring plenty of sunscreen, as temperatures are high.
text: Unas vistas increíbles de la costa peruana, sin duda un lugar que guarda entre su arena mucha historia. Los paisajes que ofrece son maravillosos, por lo que no hay que dudar en visitarlos. Solo hay que ir preparados con bastante bloqueador, porque las temperaturas son altas.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Incredible and beautiful scenery, it's a shame there are no good roads or safety.
text: Unos paisajes increibles muy bonito, lástima que no hay buenos caminos ni seguridad.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A beautiful beach located in the Paracas National Reserve. The water is quite cold, and you have to get there by private transport. The beach is clean; littering is not allowed, and alcohol is prohibited. It has spectacular views. It's definitely worth taking a trip there.
text: Linda playa ubicada en la Reserva de Paracas, las aguas son bastante frías, para llegar tienes que hacerlo en transporte privado. La playa es limpia, no se permite ensuciarla, no se toma alcohol, tiene unas vistas espectaculares. Definitivamente vale la pena darse un viajecito por allá.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful beach and view. It's well-maintained and secure. To get there, you have to pass the Paracas Museum and continue through the desert until you reach a well-marked parking lot. It's not difficult to get there. The color of the sea at that point is quite beautiful. The water may be a bit chilly, but it's compensated by the view and being in the Paracas Reserve.
text: Bonita playa y vista. Está bien cuidada y tiene seguridad. Para llegar debes pasar Paracas el museo y avanzar en el desierto hasta llegar a un parqueo bien señalizado. No es difícil llegar. El color del mar en esa parte es bastante bonito, quizá algo fría el agua pero se compensa con la vista y estar en la Reserva de Paracas.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Our vacation in the Paracas Islands with my wife Jacqui and daughter Kaori, my sister-in-law Arlita, my niece Tamara, and my in-laws was phenomenal. I highly recommend you visit!
text: VACACIONES EN LAS ISLAS DE PARACAS CON MI ESPOSA JACQUI E HIJA KAORI, CON MI CUÑADA ARLITA. SOBRINITA TÁMARA Y MIS SUEGROS FUE FENOMENAL, SE LES RECOMENDADO VISITENLO
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Paradise beaches. I took the Ballestas Islands and Paracas National Reserve tour. It's spectacular to see the sea lions. Then we went by bus to the beaches. Red Beach is beautiful, but the waves are very strong and they don't let you go in the water. We stopped at a port where you can sunbathe and enjoy the sea. The seafood is very fresh.
text: playas paradisiacas. Hice el tour de Islas ballestas y reserva paracas. es espectacular ver los lobos marinos. luego nos fuimos en bus hacia las playas, playa roja es hermosa, el oleaje es muy fuerte y no te dejan entrar. Hicimos parada en un puerto donde si puedes asolearte y disfrutar el mar. la comida de mar es muy fresca.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: An impressive landscape where you can see sea lions, Humboldt penguins and much more fauna.
text: Un paisaje impresionante donde se puede observar lobos de mar pingüinos de Humboldt y mucha fauna más
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The beach is super pretty and small, the water is super cold, but... What is terrible is the road, so it's better to go by van or tour. The entrance fee is 11 soles per person.
text:
La playa súper bonita pequeña, el agua súper fría pero lo
Que si es pésimo es el camino que es pésimo así que mejor ir en camioneta o en tour la entrada está 11 soles casa persona
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The place is very, very beautiful. But never, I repeat, never go on a Sunday. Too many people. And that makes the place very dangerous. And your trip will turn into a boring day out. I feel very proud of the beautiful places we have in our country. 👍😁😍
text: El lugar muy muy hermoso. Pero jamás, repito jamás. Vayan domingo. Demasiada gente. Y eso vuelve el lugar muy peligroso . Y tú paseó lo tomarás cómo un día aburrido. Me siento muy orgulloso de los bellos lugares que tenemos en nuestro país. 👍😁😍
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated:
A very beautiful place.
And very clean.
The water is a little cold, but other than that, everything is lovely.
text:
Lugar muy hermoso
Y muy limpio
Las aguas son un poco frias pero despues de eso todo muy lindo
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A very beautiful place, full of nature and wildlife, perfect for a family trip...
text: Un lugar muy bello y lleno de naturaleza y fauna, perfecto para ir en familia...
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Very clean with lifeguards. Because it's located within the reserve, there's an entrance fee of 11 soles per person. Seniors over 65 and children under 5 enter free. This fee grants you access to this beach and two others within the Paracas National Reserve.
text: Muy limpia con salvavidas. Por encontrarse en la reserva, se debe de pagar un ingreso de 11 soles por persona. Mayores de 65 años no pagan al igual que menores de 5años. Con este pago, puedes acceder a esta playa y a otras dos más que se encuentran en la Reserva de Paracas.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The tour from downtown Ica to the Paracas National Reserve is highly recommended, although the time is a bit short if you want to see the beaches. You can stay overnight or go on your own, as there are direct buses from Ica or you have to travel along the highway. It's sunny year-round and the people are incredibly friendly. However, there aren't many places to eat and only one place with restrooms; the restaurants don't have them.
text:
Es súper recomendado el tour que te lleve desde el centro de Ica hasta la Reserva de Paracas,aunque el tiempo es un poco corto si quieres conocer sus playas,pero puedes quedarte o en todo caso irte por tu cuenta, ya que, desde Ica hay carros directos o hay que salir hasta la carretera.
Hay sol todo el año y la gente es súper amable,eso si, no hay muchos lugares donde comer y solo hay un lugar donde hay baño,en los restaurantes no hay servicios higiénicos.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Very beautiful, but I recommend going between January and May.
text: Muy hermoso pero recomiendo ir en época de enero a mayo
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Spectacular place to enjoy the beach and sea scenery.
text: Espectacular lugar para disfrutar del paisaje de playa y mar.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A welcoming beach within the Paracas National Reserve. It features nearby restrooms, parking, and a recreation and camping area.
text: Playa acogedora dentro de la Reserva Nacional de Paracas. Con servicios higiénicos cercanos, estacionamiento y área de recreación y camping.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A nice excursion around the area. It doesn't kill you either but it's interesting, good for the family.
text: Una bonica excursió pels voltants. Tampoc mata però es interesant, bona per fer en familia.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A wonderful place that preserves Peruvian flora and fauna, where you can see animal remains from the Pleistocene era, as well as various migratory birds such as boobies, flamingos, and Humboldt penguins. A relaxing bed is also available.
text: Maravilloso lugar que conserva la flora y fauna peruana, se pueden apreciar restos óseos de animales de la era del Pleistoceno, además de las diversas aves migratorias como los piqueros, flamencos y algunos pingüinos de Humbolt. Se puede realizar una camita relajante.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: As all the locals of Paracas say, nothing to envy the beaches of other countries, La Mina is a tremendous natural wonder located in Ica, Peru.
text: Como dicen todos los lugareños de Paracas, nada que envidiar a las Playas de otros países, La Mina es tremenda maravilla natural ubicada en Ica, Perú.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated:
A wonderful place just a stone's throw from Paracas, you can get there by bike, buggy, scooter, or even on a guided jeep tour.
If you're not particularly fit, I strongly advise against biking.
Entrance fee to the reserve is 11 soles, with opening hours (at least in winter) from 9:00 am to 4:00 pm.
text:
Posto meraviglioso a due passi da Paracas, ci si può andare in bici, buggy, motorino e tour guidato con jeep.
Se non siete particolarmente allenati sconsiglio vivamente la bici.
Ingresso nella riserva 11 soles, orario di ingresso (almeno in inverno) dalle 9 alle 16
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Paracas in a nutshell? I loved it. Every place I visited was simply unique and meant to be enjoyed to the fullest. I highly recommend that both Peruvians and foreigners who haven't yet visited Paracas add it to their itinerary. You won't regret it. I guarantee it.
text: Paracas en pocas palabras? Me encantó. Todos los parajes o lugares en los que estuve son simplemente únicos, que se pueden disfrutar al máximo. Recomiendo tanto a peruanos como a extranjeros que no han Visitado Paracas, que lo incluyan en su calendario. No se van a arrepentir. Se los aseguro.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful desert landscape with very beautiful and unique beaches
text: Splendido paesaggio nel deserto con spiagge molto belle e particolari
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Very nice and tidy, although the water is very, very cold, but it's nice.
text: Muy lindo ordenado, eso sí el agua es muy, pero muy fría pero lindo
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The entire reserve is a place to see beautiful landscapes near the sea, secluded beaches, very good fishing and excellent camping sites.
text: Toda la reserva es un lugar para ver hermosos paisajes cercanos al mar, playas solitarias muy buena pesca y excelente sitios para acampar.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful, quiet beach with a lovely, relaxing view. I highly recommend it.
text: Bonita playa, tranquila, vista hermosa y relajante la recomiendo
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A must-see for anyone in the area. Incredible views and sunsets!
text: Visita obligada para quienes estén por la zona. Increíbles vistas y puestas de sol!
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated:
Recommendations:
Bring sunscreen
Hats
Extra snacks (Please bring your own bags!)
Extra change of clothes
Sandals
Towel
Camera
Sunglasses
Enjoy your trip!
text:
Recomendación:
Llevar Bloqueador
Gorros
Alimentos Extra (Cuiden el medio ambiente lleven sus bolsas %*h*:)
Muda Extra
Sandalias
Toalla
Cámara
Lentes
Disfruten el viaje!!
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful place, the bike ride there is highly recommended, to support this small town.
text: Hermoso lugar, la ida en bici es muy recomendada, para apoyar a este pequeño pueblo.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The waters are clean and calm, and there are sea urchins, shells, and fish.
text: Las aguas son limpias y tranquilas, hay presencia de erizos de mar, conchitas y peces.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Located within the Paracas National Reserve, this dreamlike beach boasts clean water, a small shoreline, and gentle waves, perfect for a peaceful swim. It's an ideal spot for families or couples. Umbrellas and chairs are available for rent. Due to pandemic restrictions, capacity is limited to 300 people.
text: En plena reserva de Paracas, playa de ensueño, mar limpio, playa pequeña así como sus olas, se puede nadar tranquilamente. Un lugar para ir con la familia o en pareja. Encuentras alquiler de sombrillas y sillas por si las necesitas. Por la pandemia el aforo es de 300 personas.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: One of the most magnificent places I've ever seen! Breathtaking scenery!
text: Um dos lugares mais magníficos que já conheci! Paisagens de tirar o fôlego!
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The scenery is beautiful, the sea and places to eat are lovely, and you can see pelicans nearby. It's a great place to go with children.
text: Muy lindo el paisaje el mar y lugares para comer se ven cerca los pelicanos lindo para ir con los niños
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Incredible place, in my opinion, the best beach in Peru if you're looking for cleanliness, tranquility (no waves), and natural beauty. It already has basic services like parking and restrooms. Since it's located within the Paracas National Reserve, restaurants and other businesses are a bit farther away.
text: Lugar increible, en mi opinión, la mejor playa del Perú, si lo q buscas es limpieza, tranquilidad (no tiene olas) y belleza natural. Ya tiene los servicios básicos como lugar de estacionamiento y servicios higiénicos. Al estar dentro de la Reserva Natural de Paracas, los negocios tipo restaurantes, están lejos.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful, but too many visitors on weekends; next time I'll go on a weekday.
text: Hermoso , pero demasiados visitantes los fines de semana , la próxima iré un día de semana
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The most beautiful place where the sea caresses the driest desert of Paracas.
text: El lugar mas hermoso donde el mar acaricia el desierto mas seco de paracas.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful place. The beach is clean and the waters are crystal clear.
text: Hermoso lugar. La playa limpia y las aguas cristalinas.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A family-friendly place with calm waters, ideal for sharing with the family.
text: Un lugar familiar aguas bien mansas ideal para compartir en familia
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The most beautiful spot; the water is calm. I went on a Saturday, so there weren't many people. The water was cold but delightful. Beautiful scenery.
text: La más hermosa, el agua es calmada, fui un sábado así que no había mucha gente. El agua fría pero deliciosa. Hermoso paisaje.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A beautiful place you can't miss, you won't regret visiting it with your family and loved ones
text: Un bello lugar que no te puedes perder no arrepentirás vistalo con tu familia y seres queridos
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Nice beach, but it's not recommended to go on holidays or public holidays.
text: Bonita playa, pero no es recomendable ir en feriados ni días festivos.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Nice place, pleasant and peaceful atmosphere. I wouldn't know what condition it's in right now :/
text: Bonito lugar, ambiente agradable y tranquilo. Actualmente no sabría en qué estado se encuentra :/
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Unmissable. One of those places you MUST NOT MISS!
text: Imperdible. Uno de los lugares que NO DEBES DEJAR PASAR Y CONOCERLO!
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Adding that to get to the beach there is a payment of 10 soles per person, if I'm not mistaken, since this is located within the Paracas National Reserve.
text: Agregando que para llegar a la playa hay un pago de 10 soles sino me equivoco por persona, ya que esto se encuentra dentro de la reserva nacional de paracas
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated:
Entry costs 11 soles for adults. Beaches like La Mina (the most popular) are available, where camping, alcoholic beverages, and loudspeakers are prohibited.
At La Mina, you can kayak for 15 soles per person or snorkel for 50 soles per person, which includes a wetsuit and mask. The water is very cold, so it's advisable not to stay in it for too long.
text:
Para entrar se requiere el pago de 11 soles adultos, se pueden encontrar playas como La Mina (la más concurrida) en la cual está prohibido acampar, llevar bebidas alcohólicas y altavoces.
En esa playa se puede hacer kayak a 15 soles por persona como snorkeling a 50 soles por persona, incluye wetsuit y la máscara. El agua es muy fría por eso es recomendable no estar mucho tiempo dentro
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A place with an amazing natural landscape, I never tire of going there and admiring every corner.
text: Lugar con un paisaje natural asombroso, no me canso de ir y admirar cada rincón.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful, very quiet beach, few people
text: Linda playa muy tranquila, poca gente
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The place where the desert meets the ocean. A beautiful place to enjoy desert landscapes with birds flying all around.
text: El lugar donde el desierto se encuentra con el océano. Hermoso lugar para disfrutar de desérticos paisajes con aves volando al rededor.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful beach, especially for going with little ones. It doesn't have big waves. The downside is that there are no restaurants, so I had to eat at a ceviche restaurant on Lagunillas beach.
text: Hermosa playa sobre todo para ir con los más pequeños no tiene olas grandes lo malo que no hay restaurantes, así que tuve que comer en una cevicheria en la playa Lagunillas
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A small and beautiful beach in Paracas, the tranquility of its waters, cleanliness, safety and beauty of its natural surroundings make it very special.
text: Pequeña y hermosa playa en Paracas, la tranquilidad de sus aguas, limpieza, seguridad y belleza de su entorno natural la hacen muy particular.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: impressed, it's exciting to be so close to these beautiful animals :D
text: impresionada, es emocionante estar tan cerca de esto hermoso animales :D
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: 5 stars, beautiful place, avoid going during peak season, it's very crowded.
text: 5 estrellas, bonito lugar, evitar ir en fechas de temporada alta, es muy concurrida.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful...small, cold water, but only sand...excellent place
text: Lindo..agua fria pequeña pero solo de arena... excelente lugar
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Highly recommended. You have to go EARLY, as in summer the beach starts to get shaded around 4 pm 👍
text: Muy recomendable. Hay que ir TEMPRANO, ya que en verano alrededor de las 16:00 ya le empieza a dar sombra a la plaaya 👍
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The beach is great, there are no waves and the water is very cold.
text: La playa super, no hay olas y el agua es bien fria
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The beach, despite being very popular, is full of seaweed and has no cleaning staff.
text: Playa llena de algas pese que es muy visitada no tiene personal de limpieza
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Very nice! Use sunscreen.
text: Muy agradable! Usar bloqueador por el sol.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated:
La Mina beach has become a popular spot for vacationers, and because it's so small, it gets incredibly crowded! You can barely hear the sea anymore.

Families camp there, cook, and play music. There aren't any decent restrooms; they're still being built. The seawater is cold, and because of all the people, the sea washes up trash.

There are huge trash cans, but it seems not everyone uses them. You can park your car at the top of the beach, and as always, someone watches it.

They rent umbrellas and chairs (20 soles). And they sell ice cream and snacks on the beach. There's a 10-soles entrance fee to the reserve.
text:
La playa la mina se ha vuelto el punto de muchos veraneantes y debido a que es muy pequeña se llena demasiado! Ya no se puede oir ni el mar.

Familias que acampan, cocinan ahi y ponen musica. No hay baños decentes, recien los estan costruyendo. El agua del mar es fria y por toda la gente el mar devulve la basura.

Hay inmensos tachos de basura! Pero al parecer no todos los usan. En la parte superior se puede dejar el carro y como siempre alguien lo cuida.

Alquilan sombrillas y sillas (20soles). Y venden helados y snacks en la playa. Se debe pagar 10 soles para entrar a la reserva.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Luis, our guide, was simply fantastic. He's incredibly dedicated, knowledgeable, and goes above and beyond. Tours with him are definitely worthwhile! And remember this tip – he has a family of two to support and does two tours a day, seven days a week... and he still gives it his all – you can tell he's passionate about his homeland.
text: Luis, unser Guide, war einfach super. Er ist sehr engagiert, kennt sich gut aus und ist unheimlich bemüht. Die Touren mit ihm lohnen sich auf jeden Fall! Und Leute denkt an den Tip - er muss eine Familie mit 2 Kindern ernähren und macht 2 Touren täglich, 7 Tage die Woche... und ist trotzdem immer mit vollem Einsatz dabei - man merkt er brennt für seine Heimat....
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful beach, beautiful place to visit
text: Hermosa playa, hermoso lugar para visitar
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A beautiful place to visit, preferably with guides who can tell you the history and help you get to know the place better.
text: Lugar precioso para visitar, preferiblemente con guías para que te cuenten la historia y conozcas mejor el lugar
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The beach is very beautiful, with a good family atmosphere.
text: Bien bonita la playa buen ambiente familiar
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Very beautiful and its beaches are great.
text: Muy bonito y sus playas geniales
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated:
Nice place, but at the last minute you have to pay more for the tour. And they promise to speak English, but they don't. Oh yeah, and they don't know how to sail, such as forgetting to fill up the tank, and we ended up stuck at sea.🤣😂
Nice place, but at the last minute you have to pay more for the tour. And they promise to speak English, but they don't. Oh, and they don't know how to sail, such as forgetting to fill up the tank, and we ended up drifting at sea.🤣😂
Good luck, but in the last minute you have to pay more for the tour. And they promise to speak English, but they don't have it. Ah, sí, y no saben cómo navegar, ya que olvidaron de llenar el tanque y nos quedamos varados en medio del océano.🤣😂
text:
Leuke plek maar op het laatste moment moet je meer betalen voor de tour. En ze beloven Engels te spreken maar doen dat niet. O ja en ze weten niet hoe ze moeten varen zoals het vergeten om de tank op te vullen en we bleven daardoor stil te liggen op zee.🤣😂
Nice place but at the last minute you have to pay more for the tour. And they promise to speak English but they don't. Oh and they do not know how to sail such as forgetting to fill up the tank and we stay drifting at sea.🤣😂
Bonito lugar, pero en el último minuto tienes que pagar más por el tour. Y prometen hablar inglés pero no lo hacen. Ah, sí, y no saben cómo navegar, ya que olvidaron de llenar el tanque y nos quedamos varados en medio del océano.🤣😂
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Very pretty, but better to visit on a weekday
text: Muy bonita, pero mejor visitar en día de semana
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A great way to connect with nature. The number of birds you'll see far exceeds any expectations!
text: Buena opción para entrar en contacto con la naturaleza. La cantidad de aves que se observan superan ampliamente cualquier expectativa.!
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: One of the best destinations to have fun and witness the wonder of divine nature.
text: Uno de los mejores destinos para divertirse y espectar la maravilla de la naturaleza divina.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Entrance fee: 11 soles. Beautiful beach, but crowded. It's located in the Reserve, so take care of it. Take your trash home.
text: Entrada 11 soles.Bonita playa pero concurrida.Se encuentra en la Reserva por lo tanto deben cuidarlo.Lleven sus desperdicios a casa.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Excellent, the sea water is very cold but it's the best
text: Excelente ,el agua del mar muy fría pero es lo máximo
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The whole view from the Itshmo area is beautiful, truly gorgeous.
text: Bello tod la vista desde la zona de itshmo la verdad hermoso
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Excellent spot for families, with calm turquoise water. They rent umbrellas and chairs. They don't sell food, so bring your own.
text: Excelente sitio para compartir en familia, agua turquesa y tranquila. Alquilan sombrillas y sillas. No venden comida, tomar previsiones.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: At the entrance, they made us pay the entrance fee even though we were senior citizens, who should be exempt from paying according to law. According to the person, the law has now "changed," and senior citizens are considered to be 65 years of age or older. Without showing any law, it was very bad to receive this treatment. According to Law 28803, senior citizens are considered to be 60 years of age or older.
text: A la entrada nos hicieron pagar el ingreso a pesar de ser personas adulto mayor que debemos estar exonerados del pago según Ley. Según la persona ahora la ley "ha cambiado" y el adulto mayor es a partir de 65 años, sin mostrar ley alguna, mal muy mal, recibir este trato. Según ley 28803 adulto mayor es a partir de los 60 años.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The scenery is stunning, the turquoise waters on the beaches were gorgeous! Plus, you can do adventure sports; I highly recommend Paracasesaventura.
text: Una belleza de paisajes , playas de aguas turquezas lindas me encanto ! Ademas se puede realizar deporte de aventura , les recomiendo Paracasesaventura
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Without a doubt, the best place I've ever seen!!! Highly recommended for family, couples, friends, everyone!!
text: Sin duda el mejor lugar que he visto en mi vida!!! Suoer recomendado para familia, pareja, amigos, para todos!!
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Very nice, but I expected more from this place and it should have more security for tourists.
text: Muy lindo pero espere más de este lugar y debería tener más seguridad para los turistas.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A beautiful and welcoming place, anyone who likes the beach will love it, highly recommended, as is the beach El Raspón which is almost next door.
text: Lugar bonito y acogedor, a quien le guste la playa le va encantar, muy recomendable al igual que la playa el raspón que está casi al lado.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Excellent. Wonderful place.
text: Excelente. Maravilloso lugar
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful place in the southern part of Peru
text: Bello lugar del sur chico peruano
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful view, but very windy 🌬 and you don't end up getting covered in sand 😹
text: Hermosa vista, pero mucho viento 🌬 y de no termina bañándose con la arena 😹
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Super cool and quiet, I recommend going from Monday to Thursday since there aren't many people.
text: Super chévere, tranquilo, les recomiendo ir de lunes a jueves ya que no hay mucha gente
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Spectacular view. Good for families... Beautiful beach
text: Vista espectacular. Bueno para familias... Linda playa
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A very good place, I recommend the Ballestas Islands
text: Muy buen lugar recomiendo las Islas Ballestas
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: It's been remodeled!! Great for weekend family camping trips, there are very clean bathrooms and even a kiosk where you can buy food – really cool!
text: Esta remodelado!! Genial para acampar fines de semana en familia hay baños bien limpios y hasta un kiosco donde comprar alimentos de verdad muy genial!
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A beach with a precise location; a calm and clean sea.
text: Una playa con una ubicación precisa; un mar tranquilo y limpio.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Excellent place, super clean and well maintained. I recommend going early and in summer because it's very windy. Crystal clear water.
text: Excelente lugar, súper limpio y bien cuidado. Recomiendo ir temprano y en verano porque corre mucho viento. Aguas cristalinas
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful place to visit. We went for two days, and I've concluded that it should be visited on a weekday.
text: Bello lugar para visitar. Fuimos 2 días a lo que concluyo que debe ser visitado un día de semana
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A spectacular, wonderful, and fascinating place. I love connecting with the sea, and this is the perfect spot to do it. You won't regret it.
text: Un lugar espectacular, maravilloso y fascinante, me encanta conectar con el mar y es el lugar apropiado para hacerlo. No te arrepentirás.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A very beautiful and safe beach to go swimming with the whole family
text: Una playa muy muy bonita y segura para ir a nadar con toda la familia
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A desert with some magical places and great geological interest. Don't forget water and sun protection.
text: Desierto con algunos lugares mágicos y con mucho interés geológico. Importante no olvidar agua y protección solar.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A lovely beach to enjoy with the family; it's like a swimming pool. It's recommended to go on a weekday. There's a place to camp.
text: Linda playa para disfrutar con la familia, parece una piscina. Se recomienda ir día de semana. Hay lugar para acampar.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Excellent place to open your mind and relax.
text: Excelente lugar para abrir la mente y relajarse.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful natural place to see birds, marine animals and full of beautiful beaches.
text: Preciosos lugar natural oara ver las aves, animales marines y lleno de hermosas playas.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: It's a great place to visit and spend time with family. They follow biosafety protocols.
text: Es un buen lugar para conocer y estar en familia. Manejan los protocolos de bioseguridad.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The beach is amazing, I've totally fallen in love with it, and the scenery is wow, beautiful...
text: La playa es lo maximo, me he enamorado totalmente, y su paisaje woww hermoso..
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: This is great for a full day
text: Esta muy bueno para un full day
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful place to enjoy with family, friends, etc...
text: Hermoso lugar para disfrutar con la familia, amigos, etc...
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: I recommend it, it's beautiful but the water is very cold.
text: Les recomiendo es bonito pero muy fría el agua
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The most beautiful beaches south of Lima
text: Lo más hermoso al sur de Lima de playas hablando
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Calm sea, clean beach. I recommend going early because it gets crowded around 11:00 am.
text: Mar calmo, playa limpia. Recomiendo que vayan temprano porque alrededor de las 11.00am está llena
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful place to spend time with family
text: Hermoso lugar para pasar en familia
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful landscape tour to the Islas Ballestas very nice and interesting!!!
text: Paesaggio  bellissimo tour alle Islas  Ballestas molto carino e interessante!!!
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful, everything is clean, and the sea is quite calm. Animals and food are not allowed. There is parking, restrooms, and changing rooms. Umbrellas and chairs are available for rent.
text: Bonito, todo limpio, el mar es bastante sereno . No permiten el ingreso de  anilames ni comida. Hay estacionamiento, baños y vestidores. Alquilan sombrillas y sillas.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A very peaceful beach, definitely highly recommended ❤❤❤
text: Una playa muy tranquila, sin duda muy recomendada ❤❤❤
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Excellent place to enjoy the sea and open space. It's recommended to go by car, preferably one that can handle the sand. Visit all the viewpoints.
text: Excelente lugar para disfrutar del mar y el espacio libre. Recomendado ir en auto de preferencia que te aguante la arena. Ir a todos los miradores.

The 11 soles entrance fee is totally worth it.

textTranslated: Excellent experience. Incredible diversity and history.
text: Exelente experiencia. Increible tanta diversidad e historia
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated:
The reserve is only a reserve in name and the entrance fee. There are hardly any signs with information about the species, their conservation status, breeding season, or whether they pass through the reserve. Fishermen are fishing with nets, and several people are removing seaweed from the beach (I don't know if it's for tourism or fishing), which are crucial ecosystems for many of the wildlife that lives there. The roads are in terrible condition; cars and buggies drive onto the beach and through the dunes (where many species live and nest). To top it all off, the visitor center is closed for "maintenance." Swimming isn't included in the entrance fee either. It's a disgrace of a reserve; it's just a money-making scheme for tourists.

The landscapes and beaches are very beautiful, and there are many birds in the area.
text:
De reserva solo tiene el nombre y lo que te cobran en la entrada. Apenas hay carteles informativos sobre las especies y su estado de conservación, época de cría o paso por la reserva. Hay pescadores pescando con red, varias personas retirando las algas de la playa ( no sé si es por turismo o pesca) que son ecosistemas super importantes para mucha fauna que vive en ellas. Las carreteras dan lástima, los carros y bugys se meten en la playa y por las dunas ( donde viven y anidan muchas especies) y para colmo el centro de interpretación está cerrado por "mantenimiento" . El baño tampoco está incluido en el precio de la entrada. Una vergüenza de reserva, solo es un saca dinero para los turistas.
Los paisajes y las playas son muy bonitas y hay muchas aves en la zona
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful beach but very cold

textTranslated:
The sensational reviews I've read have nothing to do with reality. It's actually a normal beach with freezing cold water, so forget about basking in the water for more than 10 minutes. You have to pay to get in, even though they don't offer you anything except entry to a privately owned site. The problem is that it's the only one suitable for swimming, so you're practically forced to go. At 4:00 PM, the rocks in the cove provide shade.

In conclusion, nothing special, but if you have nothing to do all day, go for it.
text:
Le recensioni sensazionali che ho letto non hanno niente a che vedere con la realtà. In realtà è’ una normale spiaggia con acqua freddissima quindi scordatevi di crogiolarvi per più di 10 min in acqua. Per entrare devi pagare anche se non ti offrono assolutamente niente se non appunto l’entrata a un sito che hanno privatizzato, il problema è’ che è l’unica balneabile quindi sei praticamente obbligato. Alle 16.00 inizia l’ombra dovuta dalle rocce dell’ insenatura.

In conclusione niente di speciale ma se non avete niente da fare tutto il giorno andateci pure.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

Another point to consider is that there are rocks in certain areas, so be careful before going swimming.

Una excelente ubicación, en tanto se disfruta de la playa se puede ver peces, lo malo es que la vez que fui hubo mucha gente, el aforo es de 500 personas por dos horas, tomar sus precauciones en ese sentido.

Otro punto a considerar es que hay piedras por ciertas partes, se debe tener cuidado antes de ingresar a nadar

textTranslated: I've been going to this magical beach for several years now, but this year I was pleasantly surprised to find that camping is prohibited; you can only go swimming. The beach and even the sand were clean, unlike last year. Now there are staff members monitoring and controlling the beach. So if you go to this beautiful paradise, please take care of it.
text: Ya van varios años que voy a esta playa mágica, pero este año me di con la grata sorpresa que esta prohibido hacer campamento, solo puedes ir a bañarte, la playa y hasta la arena estaban limpias a diferencia del año pasado, ahora hay personal que cuida y controla la playa. Así que si vas a este hermoso paraíso, cuidalo.

textTranslated: Beautiful beaches in the middle of a desert. The area is well protected, with camping, food, and music equipment prohibited. Swimming and enjoying the scenery are the only things allowed. As for the weather, the sun shines year-round. I went in winter (in Lima) and still enjoyed the beautiful sunshine. Because it's a reserve, you can find birds and fish right on the shore! 😁😁🤞👍
text: Hermosas playas en medio de un desierto, el lugar está bien protegido, está prohibido acampar, ingresar alimentos, equipos de música, etc. Solo se permite bañarse en el mar y disfrutar del paisaje. En cuanto al clima el sol es todo el año, me tocó ir en invierno (Lima) e igual se aprecia un hermoso sol. Debido a que es una reserva, se pueden encontrar aves y peces en plena orilla! 😁😁🤞👍
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: It's a great option for sightseeing and having a good time.
text: Es una muy buena opción para hacer turismo y pasarla bien.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: I went on Sunday, July 25th, and there was a queue to get onto the beach since capacity is limited. Entry to the reserve is 11 soles for adults and 3 soles for children. Overall, I thought it was good, but I didn't get to see the beach up close because of the crowds.
text: Fui el domingo 25.07 y había cola para ingresar a la playa ya que el aforo es limitado. La entrada a la reserva es de 11 adultos y 3 soles niños. En particular, considero que estuvo bien pero no llegué a ver la playa desde cerca debido a la cantidad de gente.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated:
Excellent, although it's getting more crowded.
You should go early; the wind is very strong in the afternoons.
If you decide to go, please don't litter the beaches or the sea. There are trash cans nearby, and the restrooms are not free.
text:
Excelente, aunque cada vez es más concurrida.
Debes ir temprano, el viento por las tardes es muy fuerte.
Si se animan a ir por favor no ensucien las playas ni el mar, hay tachos cerca y los servicios higiénicos se pagan.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Nice place to enjoy 😊
text: Bonito lugar para disfrutar 😊
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A wonderful beach... Super calm and clean for swimming... fantastic for children.
text: Una playa maravillosa ... Para bañarse super mansa y limpia ...para los niños es fantástica ..
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Nice but too crowded
text: Bonito pero mucha gente
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Simply magical, spectacular, beautiful. I love my Peru; it has extraordinary landscapes, and Paracas is no exception. A few months ago, I visited it with someone from abroad, and they fell in love with it, especially seeing the wildlife in its natural habitat... There's nothing like it. If you want to have a wonderful time and create a memorable experience, I recommend visiting Paracas so you can be amazed by the epic views, desert, and beaches.
text: Simplemente mágico, espectacular, precioso. Amo mi Perú, tiene paisajes extraordinarios y Paracas no es la excepción. Hace unos meses lo visité con alguien del exterior y se enamoró un tanto, sobre todo de ver la fauna en su hábitat natural... No hay nada como ello. Si desean pasar un agradable momento y crear un recuerdo memorable, les informo a visitar Paracas para que queden maravillados con la vista épica, desierto y playa
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: It's a very beautiful beach! It gets very windy in the afternoon, but the scenery is lovely. The water is freezing cold; I wouldn't personally enjoy swimming there, although many people do and have a great time 😎
text: Es una playa muy bonita! Hace mucho aire por la tarde pero el paisaje es bello. El agua es helada, a mi parecer no disfrutaría nadar en sus aguas aunque mucha gente lo hace y se divierte 😎
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Very nice place
text: Muy bonito lugar
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The reservation was incredibly exciting... The walk was beautiful
text: Brutalmente emocionante la reserva... Es muy bonito el paseo
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful beach, the water is crystal clear. Great! Although the water is a bit cold. They rent umbrellas for 20 soles and chairs for 20 soles each. Kayaks are available for 30 soles for half an hour. It's a very calm beach. It gets very crowded on weekends. There are many steps to go down to reach the beach. There are restrooms at the top. There's a parking area before you go down to the beach.
text: Hermosa playa, el agua es transparente. Genial! Aunque el agua está un poco fría. Alquilan sombrillas a 20 soles y sillas también a 20 cada una. Hay Kayak para remar a 30 soles por media hora. Es una playa muy calmada. Hay mucha gente los fines de semana. Se bajan muchas gradas para llegar a la playa. Hay baños arriba. Hay área para estacionar antes de bajar a la playa.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful beach, with radiant sunshine!
text: Linda playa ,con sol radiante  !!!!
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The beach is beautiful, with cool, crystal-clear water and gentle waves, ideal for children. I recommend bringing goggles and a swim cap; there are lots of fish. The calm waters are also perfect for swimming. It's less crowded than the mine. Bringing drinks, food, or speakers is prohibited.
text: La playa es hermosa, agua fría y cristalina, de olas suaves, ideal para niños. Les recomiendo llevar lentes de buceo y gorra de natación, hay muchos peces. Además que la calma del mar se presta para nadar. Es menos concurrida que la mina. Y esta prohibido el ingreso de bebidas, alimentos, y parlantes.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A great place to visit in the summer. You can camp on La Mina beach, which is one of the best, but it's prohibited between mid-December and January. Hopefully, the number of visitors will remain high so it doesn't fall into disrepair. There are also a couple of other "pristine" beaches nearby. However, cell phone service is weak. It's also about half an hour from Paracas, and there are very few shops.
text: Buen lugar para visitar en el verano. Se puede acampar en la playa la mina, que es una de las mejores, pero entre quincena de diciembre y enero, está prohibido. Ojalá el flujo de gente se mantenga, para que no se descuide. Igual hay un par de playas a los alrededores que son "vírgenes". Eso sí, la señal del celular es baja. Además se encuentra a media hora de Paracas, y solo hay poco comercio.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful beach, I loved it.
text: Linda playa me encantó
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A lovely experience to visit
text: Bonita experiencia para visita
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: An excellent place to have a great time!!! Highly recommended
text: Un lugar excelente para pasarla muy bien!!! Recomendado
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Wild, with impressive landscapes and a desert atmosphere, as well as numerous beaches and cliffs... A bit lunar ^^, the entrance fee to the reserve is 11 soles per person. Wild camping is also possible, but you need to plan your waste disposal in advance, okay? ^^ because unfortunately, tourist pollution is at work... despite the signs and trash cans in the reserve and the work of the reserve staff...
text: Sauvage, impressionnants paysages et atmosphères désertiques ainsi que de nombreuses plages et falaises... Un peu lunaire ^^ , l'entrée de la réserve est de 11 soles par personne. Il est aussi possible de faire du camping sauvage mais il faut prévoir a l'avance la gestion de ses déchets, hein! ^^ car malheureusement, la pollution touristique est à l'œuvre... malgré les panneaux et points poubelles dans la réserve et le travail des personnels de la réserve...
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: This is a magnificent geological and ecological park, featuring a coastal landscape formed by desert, yet boasting a unique ecosystem teeming with seabirds. A visit here is highly recommended, in addition to any regular sea excursions. However, the park is vast and entirely desert; without a local guide, first-time visitors might easily get lost in the desert.
text: 非常壯麗的地質與生態公園，由沙漠構成的海岸地形，在岸邊卻是充滿海鳥生態的特殊景觀；除了一般的出海行程外，有機會一定要來此地一遊。但此公園幅員廣大，且全部是沙漠，如果沒有當地導遊，第一次來可能會迷失在沙漠中。
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The sea is very clean and beautiful. This beach is worth a visit, despite its remoteness. The only thing they could improve is the service provided by the lifeguards and changing rooms. For the 2 soles they charge to enter the bathroom, it's not worth it, as the toilets aren't maintained, nor are the changing rooms lit.
text: El mar es muy limpio y lindo. Esta playa vale la pena ser visitada, apesar de la lejanía. Lo único que pueden mejorar es la atención en los bañeros y vestidores. Para los 2 soles que cobran para entrar al baño, no vale la pena pues los inodoros no tienen mantenimiento, ni los vestidores que no cuentan con luz.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The landscape is incredibly beautiful. Absolute desert meets ocean.
text: Die Landschaft ist unglaublich schön. Absolute Wüste trifft Ozean.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Very quiet and beautiful place
text: Lugar muy tranquilo y bonito
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: One of the most beautiful beaches I know, thanks to the reserve it stays very clean, although it's a shame that we humans don't have the same values ​​of cleanliness, but they take good care of it. It would just be good to have more trash cans and lighting to appreciate a beautiful sunset.
text: Una de las hermosas playas que conozco, gracias a la reserva se mantiene bien limpia aunque lastima q los humanos no tenemos los valores de la Limpieza pero lo cuidan mucho, solo sería bueno más tachos para los residuos e iluminación para apreciar un hermoso atardecer
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Simply a beautiful beach.
text: Simplemente bellísima playa.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The entrance fee is about 11 soles for adults and 5 soles for children. It's very popular now, so there's a queue to get in. But the beach is very clean, the sea is calm enough for children, and it's very relaxing.
text: Se tiene que pagar como 11 soles adulto y 5 niños, ahora es muy concurrido así que se hace cola para poder ingresar. Pero la playa es muy limpia, el mar calmado como para los niños, muy relajante.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful beach, but very rocky, so with strong waves you might get bumps or cuts. A good place to spend a weekend, with great views and delicious lunch options... Recommended.
text: Bonita playa, posee muchas piedras, así que con olas fuertes uno puede resultar con golpes o cortes. Buen lugar para pasar un fin de semana, con lugares con buena vista y comida rica para almorzar... Recomendable
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: It's a very nice and clean beach, ideal for a day at the beach or camping. It's a small beach and gets completely crowded on weekends during the summer. Access has been improved. You'll see many local animals, so please be careful around them as they live within a protected area. If you manage to visit, please admire its beauty without polluting.
text: Es una playa muy buena y limpia, ideal para un día de playa o campamentos. Es una playa pequeña y en verano los fines de semana se llena completamente. El acceso fue mejorado. Verán muchos animales de la zona y tener cuidado con ellos ya que se encutran dentro de una zona de reserva. Si logran visitarla, admiren de su bellaza sin contaminar por favor.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: It's a very touristy place where you can find a variety of shops and restaurants offering diverse cuisine. They also offer tours.
text: Es un lugar muy turistico donde podras encontrar variedad en tiendas y restaurante en variedad d su gastronomia. Tambien ofrecen paseos..
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The best, an unforgettable experience, good and beautiful beaches
text: Lo maximo una experiencia inolvidable buenas y bonitas playas
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: It's one of the most beautiful beaches I've ever seen... Highly recommended
text: Es una de las playas mas lindas que he podido ver... Super recomendada
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Speechless, truly beautiful!!!!
text: Sin palabras, realmente hermosa!!!!
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A very beautiful, free beach with fine sand and no rocks. It's very well-managed, with a single entrance guarded by security personnel who make sure not much plastic is brought in. The water is clean and the shores are free of trash. They charge for using the changing rooms (which is a bit absurd), but I imagine it's to pay the cleaning staff.
text: Una playa muy hermosa, gratis, sin rocas, con arena fina, está muy bien controlada, tiene un unico ingreso resguardado por seguridad q cuidan que no se ingrese mucho plástico. Agua limpia y orillas sin nada de basura. Cobran el uso de vestidor (algo un poco absurdo) pero me imagino es para pagar personal que limpia.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The beach is beautiful, but there were 10 people per square meter, all littering with paper, food scraps, trash, and plastic. We paid 10 soles per adult to enter the reserve and found the beach a complete mess. They say they clean it, but it's never clean. What a shame, a disgrace, and an embarrassment to our natural heritage.
text: La playa es linda, pero habían 10 personas por metro cuadrado, todas botaban papeles, comida, basura, plásticos. Pagamos 10 soles por adulto para ingresar a la reserva y encontrar la playa hecha un muladar, dicen que limpian pero jamás queda limpia, qué lástima, pena y vergüenza por nuestro patrimonio natural.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful beach, they should implement more services to protect it better.
text: Hermosa playa , deben implementar más servicios para protergela mejor
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Spectacular view, an unforgettable experience.
text: Espectacular vista, una experiencia inolvidable.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful beach, perfect for a family outing and enjoying the summer
text: Hermosa playa, para ir en familia y disfrutar del verano
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A beautiful place; the beach is completely clean (except for a few irresponsible people who leave their masks and the odd bottle lying around). The water temperature is average.
text: Un hermoso lugar, la playa es totalmente limpia (salvo algunas personas irresponsables que dejan sus mascarillas y una u otra botella por ahí). El agua es de temperatura regular.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A relatively small place, the sea is very calm.
text: Un lugar relativamente pequeño, muy tranquilo el mar.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The most beautiful place I've visited in Paracas
text: El massss lindo lugar que he visitado en Paracas
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: You need to go with plenty of time because each beach has its own beautiful views
text: Tienes que ir con tiempo por qué cada playa tienes sus bonitas vistas
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated:
Beautiful beach. You have to go early because it gets crowded.
You can bring your own umbrella, or you can rent them there. Umbrellas are 20 soles, and chairs are 5 soles each.
Please take care of your trash, because many people leave garbage or things blow away; don't ruin it.
text:
Hermosa playa. Hay que ir temprano porque se llena de gente.
Podes llevar tu sombrilla, y sino en el lugar alquilan. Sombrilla 20 soles, y sillas 5 soles cada una.
Por favor cuiden sus residuos, porque mucha gente deja basura, o se le vuelan cosas, no la arruinen.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful, secluded, quiet and clean place in Paracas
text: Hermoso lugar, recondito, tranquilo y limpio en Paracas
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: This beach plus Los Ñuros, Cabo Blanco and Tuquillo are beautiful beaches and there are activities nearby.
text: Esta playa más los ñuros, cabo blanco y tuquillo bonitas playas y actividades cerca de ellas.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A super beautiful place to spend time with family
text: Un lugar super hermoso donde pasar en familia
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The ultimate, total enjoyment of nature
text: Lo máximo, disfrute total de la naturaleza
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Limited capacity for the number of people attending on holidays.
text: Aforo limitado para la cantidad de gente que asiste en días festivos.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: There are so many lovely things to observe and learn.
text: Lindo muchas cosas que observar y aprender
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful beaches and very calm seas. If you wish, you can go to the islands to look for sea lions. As a reserve, it is very well maintained, although they should improve access to the beaches, which is the reason most people visit and provides a good portion of the reserve's income.
text: Buenas playas y mar muy tranquilo. Si lo deseas puedes ir a las islas a buscar a los lobos de mar. Como reserva está muy bien cuidada aunque deberían mejorar los accesos a las playas, que son el motivo por el cual la mayoría ingresa y que le dan la una buena parte de sus ingresos a la reserva.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The place is really cool and charming!! I hope it never changes
text: Muy chulo el lugar y con mucho encanto !! Que no cambie
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful little beach, clear water, parasol rental available
text: Belle petite plage l'eau est claire, location de parasol disponible
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Incredible place! The union of the desert and the sea results in a breathtaking landscape! Tickets are purchased in the center, near the boat embarkation point. All tourist attractions are signposted. There are some restaurants within the Reserve, a museum, and an information center. I recommend renting bikes to enjoy the place without the rush of organized tours.
text: Lugar incrível! A união do deserto com o mar resulta em uma pasaigem de tirar o fôlego! O ingresso é comprado no centro, perto do embarque das lanchas. Todos os pontos turísticos são sinalizados. Há alguns restaurantes dentro da Reserva, um museu e um centro de informações. Aconselho o aluguel de bikes para poder curtir o lugar sem a correria dos tours contratados.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful beach with cold water.
text: Bonita playa con frías aguas.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Easily accessible, with diverse tourist offerings. Restaurants to suit all budgets.
text: De fácil acceso, diversas ofertas turísticas. Restaurantes para todos los bolsillos.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Cozy, beautiful, the water is cold but cozy, be aware it gets crowded in summer.
text: Acogedor, bonito, fría el agua pero acogedor, ojo es lleno en verano.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful place. Incredible scenery.
text: Bello lugar. Increíble paisaje
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Wonderful place. Peaceful, strong winds, beautiful beaches. 100% recommended for escaping the chaos of the city. It's also close to Lima for those of us coming from there and affordable. A great option for a family trip. The waves aren't too strong for children. Be aware, the beach in the town of Paracas is quite dirty. Unfortunately, it's not well-maintained, and you have to be careful of jellyfish. But the Reserve is different. I recommend La Mina and El Raspón beaches.
text: Maravilloso lugar. Tranquilo, vientos fuertes, bellas playas. 100% recomendable para alejarse del caos de la Ciudad. Además es cercano a Lima para los que venimos de ahí y económico. Gran opción para venir en familia. Las olas no son nada fuertes para los niños. Ojo, en el pueblo de Paracas la playa sí está bien sucia. Lamentablemente no la cuidan y hay que tener cuidado con las medusas. Pero la Reserva es deferente. Recomiendo la playa La Mina y el Raspón.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: It's a beautiful tourist attraction, home to millions of birds and sea lions. Stunning landscapes dotted with islands boasting unique rock formations. The tour concludes with a two-hour boat ride.
text: Es un atractivo turístico muy bello, esta la isla donde habitan millones de aves y los lobos marinos. Paisajes hermosos lleno de islas con diferentes formaciones rocosas que lo hacen único. Un paseo en lancha de 2 horas para terminar el tours.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: It's a good place to visit.
text: Es una buena opción de visita
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Very beautiful scenery, I enjoyed it.
text: Muy lindo paisaje lo disfrute
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful beach. The sea is very calm. Families can come here, including small children. Be careful with some rocky areas and the wind, which can be strong at times. Otherwise, it's a magnificent experience.
text: Hermosa playa. El mar es muy tranquilo. Se puede venir en familia, incluído niños pequeños. Se debe tener cuidado con algunas zonas de rocas que hay y el viento que por momento es fuerte. Por lo demás es una experiencia magnífica
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The Ballestas Islands are absolutely beautiful
text: Super hermosas las islas ballestas
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: It has improved in installing trails, viewpoints and services for visitors
text: A mejorado en la instalar senderos, miradores y servicios para los visitantes
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Perhaps the most popular of the Paracas beaches, but personally I didn't like it because it's so popular that when I went it was completely packed, it felt like a fair, and I didn't enjoy it for that reason. The coastal path of this beach is beautiful, with a sandy area and a rocky area. A few meters out to sea there's a small mound that juts out from which swimmers dive. You can have a good time there, but perhaps on certain days or at times when there's less noise or fewer tourists...
text: La más popular quizá de las playas de paracas pero en lo personal no me agrado porque justamente es tan popular que cuando fui estaba totalmente lleno, parecía ya una feria y no me agrado por eso, el circuito litoral de esta playa es bonito, tiene una zona de arena y otra de piedras, unos metros mar adentro hay un montículo que sobresale desde el cual los bañistas hacen sus clavados; si se puede pasar un buen rato pero quizá en días particulares o en horarios con menos bullicio o menos carga turística...
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful place with a gorgeous ocean and excellent weather. The people are very attentive and friendly. 100% recommended for visiting with your children and family.
text: Hermoso lugar con bello océano y excelente clima. La gente muy atenta y amigable. 100% recomendado para venir con sus hijos y familia
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The Nature Reserve is beautiful. With cliffs plunging into the sea, a rugged, desert landscape contrasts beautifully with the turquoise waters, and abundant wildlife. It has sheltered beaches with calm waters on one side and rough, windy waters on the other. The entire reserve can be visited in a single day.
text: La Reserva Natural es hermosa. Con acantilados que caen al mar, un paisaje agreste y desértico con el contraste del agua turquesa de fondo y mucha fauna. Tiene playas reparadas con aguas mansas y del lado opuesto aguas agitadas y ventosas. Se puede visitar toda la reserva en un dia.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The last time we were here was fantastic. Every time we return, the reserve surprises us. We hope to come back soon to walk around the spa, take photos, and visit other spots we haven't seen in a while. We're also looking forward to seeing the mollusk fossils scattered throughout the area.
text: La última vez que estuvimos aquí fue genial, siempre que volvemos nos sorprende la reserva, esperamos volver pronto para caminar por el balneario, tomar fotos, visitar otros puntos que hace tiempo no visitamos. Volver a ver los fósiles de moluscos que hay por toda la zona.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A very beautiful beach...it has a spectacular view...it looks like a swimming pool...but it's confirmed that on weekends it's very crowded with visitors...a bit uncomfortable going down the stairs with small children...and well, with so many visitors the beach is dirty at the end of the day...we need to be more responsible and show some courtesy!!
text: Muy hermosa playa....tiene una vista espectacular...parece una piscina...pero confirmado que fines de semana está muy hacinada de visitantes....un poco incómodo para bajar las escaleras con niños pequeños..y bueno al tener tantos visitantes la playa queda sucia al finalizar el día...tenemos que ser más responsables y demostrar educación!!
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A very beautiful place, it has various establishments including restaurants and shops selling souvenirs, from keychains to complete swimsuit sets. Prices vary from the outside to the inside, and various credit and debit cards are accepted.
text: Un lugar muy bello, cuenta con distintos establecimientos desde restaurantes. tiendas para compras de recuerdos del lugar, desde un llavero hasta un conjunto completo para cambio de ropa de baño , estos varían su precio desde las afueras hasta en su interior, en este se puede hacer uso de distintas tarjetas de crédito y débito.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated:
The beach is beautiful, but it's crowded. The easiest way to get there is by car. There's also a taxi service that takes you there (they leave from Paracas or Pisco).

Before entering the beach, you'll be given a quick check. Be careful with your belongings, as the crowds can cause you to lose things.
text:
La playa es hermosa pero hay mucha gente. La forma más fácil de llegar es con movilidad propia. También hay servicio de taxi que llega hasta el lugar (parten de paracas o pisco).

Antes de entrar a la playa te hacen una ligera revisión, tener cuidado con las cosas que por la cantidad de personas se pueden perder las cosas.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The reserve is beautiful, and everything is well-maintained. The entrance fee for visitors from outside the region is 11 soles. You can explore by ATV, car, buggy, or bicycle. Trekking is also an option, if I'm not mistaken, although the trails are quite extensive.
text: La reserva es muy bella, todo está bien cuidado. El costo si eres fuera de la región es de 11 soles, se puede pasear en cuatrimotos en auto propio, buggis y bicicleta. También se puede hacer trekking si no me equivoco aunque el recorrido es bien amplio.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful beach, very well maintained and clean; if you buy a ticket for the Ballestas Islands you also have access to this beach
text: Linda playa muy bien cuidada y limpia, si compras ticket para islas ballestas tambien se tiene acceso a esta playa
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: This beautiful beach complements the natural beauty of the Paracas National Reserve, offering a space for visitors to enjoy. Although small, its beauty is magnificent, surrounded by incredible rock formations, with an intense blue sea and gentle waves lapping the sand.
text: Preciosa playa que complementa la belleza natural de la Reserva Natural de Paracas, con un espacio para el disfrute de los visitantes. Aunque es pequeña su belleza es grandiosa ya que se encuentra rodeada de formaciones rocosas increíbles, el mar es de un azul intenso y tiene la arena donde   llegan tranquilas olas.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The most beautiful beach I've ever seen. Let's take care of this lovely place 🙏🏼. It's small but gorgeous, perfect for families with children :) Since it's located within the Paracas National Reserve, it doesn't have a restaurant, but you'll find one in the Lagunilla cove area called "Tía Pily." There are restrooms and changing rooms. The entrance fee to the reserve is 11 soles and includes visits to other beaches. Please help maintain and protect this area so it doesn't get destroyed 💕
text: La playa más linda que he visto hasta el momento. Cuidemos de este lugar tan bonito 🙏🏼. Es pequeña pero hermosa, genial para la familia con niños :) como se encuentra dentro de la zona de la reserva de Paracas, no tiene restaurante, pero si encontrarán una en la zona de la caleta lagunilla “la tía Pily”. Hay baños y vestidores. Entrada a la reserva de 11 soles: comprende visitas a otras playas. Por favor mantengan y cuiden de esta zona para que no se destruya 💕
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: I enjoyed getting to know my beautiful Peru
text: Me.gusto conocer mi Perú hermoso
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated:
Excellent weather, great guide service on the boat tour.
I saw dolphins very close to the beach for the first time.
It was a wonderful experience, one I'll definitely repeat!
text:
Excelente clima, buen servicio de guía paseo en bote.
Por primera vez vi delfines muy cerca de la playa.
Fue una experiencia maravillosa, que volveré a vivir!
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated:
The beach is lovely, the scenery is beautiful, but it was very crowded and people were ignoring the rules, even bringing pots of food 🤮. I had a terrible time on a Friday, and to top it off, I lost my son because of the crowds.

And that's despite the fact that there's a limited capacity due to COVID.
text:
La playa linda los paisajes hermosos, pero mucha gente y desobediente de las reglas, llevaron ollas de comida 🤮, lo pasé desagradable un viernes, encima perdí a mi hijo por tanta gente.
Y eso q por covid hay aforo limitado.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: The best place to relax and enjoy
text: El mejor lugar para relajarse y disfrutar
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: Beautiful scenery, experiencing nature, good fishing
text: Buenos paisajes, experimentar la naturaleza, buena pesca
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: I had never been to the Reserve before, and I thought everything was beautiful. I went with my Argentine nephews, ages 12 and 9. When I explained what a reserve was, they started collecting cups, wrappers, and other trash. Unfortunately, my niece stepped on something sharp and metal, but thankfully it didn't pierce her. I went to tell the guards, and they explained that they clean the beaches every day, but people don't help out, which is very sad. They told me to go to the museum, where they would give me some t-shirts for helping the reserve. The kids were excited to go, but unfortunately, they didn't have any t-shirts left. Instead, they gave them a coloring book with mazes, as well as those tapes used to filter alcohol, face masks, and a very nice metal water bottle. Everything was labeled with the reserve's name. We left the museum happy; it was very interesting, by the way. Thank you for encouraging children and motivating them to care for the environment!
text: Nunca habia ido a la Reserva y me pareció muy lindo todo. Asistí con unos sobrinos argentinos de 12 y 9 años, al explicarles lo q era una reserva comenzaron a recolectar vasitos, envolturas y más. Lamentablemente mi sobrina piso algo punzante de metal q gracias a Dios no se lo clavó. Fuí a hacerle saber a los guardias y me explicaron q todos los dias limpian las playas pero q la gente no colabora eso es muy triste. Me dijeron q vaya al museo q alli me darian unos polos por colaborar con la reserva, los chicos entusiasmados quisieron ir pero lamentablemente ya no tenian polos y les regalaron un librito para pintar y desarrollar unos laberintos, les dieron también esas sintas donde se cuela el alcohol, mascarillas y un toma todo de metal muy lindo. Todo rotulado con nombre de la reserva. Felices nos retiramos del museo q por cierto es muy interesante. Gracias por alentar a los niños y motivarlos a cuidar el medio ambiente!!
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: A landscape from another world, crazy.
text: Un paisaje de otro mundo, de locos.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated:
Our reserves are always wonderful, especially for nature lovers; having a beautiful view and breathing fresh, clean air makes you appreciate our land and the planet even more.
I enjoyed doing my running routine along the cliff edge, listening to my excellent music selection and truly savoring the moment. Always being careful of the terrain because of the mounds of earth and rocks, maximum concentration outdoors, and the rest is heavenly.
text:
Siempre nuestras reservas van a ser maravillosas, sobre todo para los q aman la naturaleza; el tener una buena vista y respirar aire fresco y puro, hace q uno valore más nuestro territorio y el planeta.
Me gustó hacer mi rutina de running sobre el acantilado y correr el filo de éste, escuchando mi excelente música selecta que realmente disfrutar del momento. Siempre teniendo cuidado con el lugar x sus montículos de tierra y piedras, concentración máxima al aire libre y el resto es celestial.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: It's a stunning desert landscape for nature lovers. There are several places to visit, but very few have a small shop where you can buy a soda or a snack (the price is higher). Don't forget to use the restroom whenever you can, and there's only one place to eat lunch called Lagunillas, where dishes start at 25 soles.
text: Es un lugar desértico impresionante para aquellos que nos gusta la naturaleza. Hay diferentes lugares que visitar, en muy pocos hay una mini tienda donde comprar una gaseosa o golosina ( el precio es mayor), no olvides aprovechar en cuanto puedas ir al baño y solamente hay un lugar para almorzar llamado lagunillas donde los platos están de 25 Soles en adelante.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: This beach is one of my favorites; if you have the chance to visit on a weekday, even better! The tranquility and the views are dreamy. To get there, you have to travel about 6 km through the desert from the entrance to the reserve. It's best to go in a truck and with a GPS.
text: Esta playa es de mis favoritas, si tienes la oportunidad de visitarla un día de semana es mucho mejor!! la tranquilidad y las vistas son de ensueño, para llegar se tiene que recorrer unos 6 km en el desierto desde la entrada a la reserva, es mejor ir en una camioneta y con un gps
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas

textTranslated: It's super calm, perfect for swimming, the water is clean, it's only a little windy so it's good to bring a jacket.
text: Es super tranquila, se presta para nadar sin problemas, el agua limpia, solo hace un poco de viento así que es bueno llevar abrigo.
title: Reserva Nacional de Paracas
